First, it reduces expensive model training by introducing state transformers that align the input state of a new environment with previously similar states, allowing models to warm-start adaptation. Second, it addresses the often-overlooked yet costly process of data labeling--collecting ground truth for exploring and training on various system decisions--by prioritizing labeling high-utility data while balancing the tradeoff between training and labeling cost. Evaluations on eight representative learning-based systems show that EMA reduces adaptation costs (e.g., GPU training time) by 14.9-42.4% while improving system performance (e.g., network throughput) by 6.9-31.3%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EMA，首个支持学习型系统在动态环境中自适应演化的模型适配系统，通过状态转换器降低训练成本、通过高效用数据标注平衡训练与标注成本，在8个系统上实现14.9-42.4%的适配成本降低和6.9-31.3%的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的系统在面对异构、长期运行、动态变化的网络环境时缺乏自适应能力，导致模型训练成本高、数据收集量大、系统性能下降、响应缓慢。
AI.method: 提出EMA系统，采用系统驱动、数据为中心的方法：1) 引入状态转换器（State Transformers），将新环境的输入状态与历史相似状态对齐，实现模型热启动适配；2) 优先标注高效用数据，平衡训练成本与标注成本之间的权衡。
AI.result: 在8个代表性学习型系统上评估，EMA将适配成本（如GPU训练时间）降低14.9-42.4%，同时提升系统性能（如网络吞吐量）6.9-31.3%。
AI.conclusion: EMA是首个专注于学习型系统环境自适应适配的系统，通过数据驱动的方法有效解决了模型训练成本高和数据标注昂贵两大部署挑战。

title: Distribution Corrected Offline Data Distillation for Large Language Models
summary: Distilling reasoning traces from strong large language models into smaller ones is a promising route to improve intelligence in resource-constrained settings. Existing approaches face a fundamental trade-off: offline distillation from teacher-generated traces provides high-quality, sample-efficient supervision but suffers from distributional drift: during training, the student model conditions on teacher-generated prefixes, whereas during inference the student autoregresses on self-generated prefixes, leading to compounding errors over long reasoning trajectories. Meanwhile, on-policy or self-distillation methods better match the student's inference-time distribution, but require costly online sampling and often produce low-quality traces in early training. We propose a principled offline reasoning distillation framework that preserves the efficiency and supervision quality of offline teacher-generated data while correcting teacher-student distribution drift. It adaptively emphasizes teacher supervision that is better aligned with the student's on-policy distribution. Evaluations on mathematical reasoning benchmarks of GSM8K, MATH, MATH500, and harder held-out competition-style tasks, including AMC, AIME, and OlympiadBench, show that our method improves reasoning accuracy over prior offline distillation algorithms and yields more stable reasoning traces while preserving instruction-following capabilities. Our work shows that lightweight, distribution-correction-aware training can substantially strengthen offline reasoning distillation without online rollouts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种离线推理蒸馏框架，通过自适应地纠正教师-学生分布漂移，在不进行在线采样的前提下提升小模型推理能力，在数学推理基准上优于现有离线蒸馏方法。
AI.motivation: 现有离线蒸馏存在分布漂移（训练时学生用教师前缀，推理时用自生成前缀导致错误累积）；在线蒸馏虽匹配推理分布但成本高且早期轨迹质量低。作者希望在保持离线蒸馏高效性的同时纠正分布漂移。
AI.method: 提出一种原则性的离线推理蒸馏框架，自适应地强调与学生在线分布更对齐的教师监督信号，从而纠正教师-学生分布漂移，无需在线 rollout。
AI.result: 在GSM8K、MATH、MATH500以及更难AMC、AIME、OlympiadBench等竞赛级基准上，相比已有离线蒸馏算法提高了推理准确率，推理轨迹更稳定，且保留了指令跟随能力。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级的分布漂移纠正训练可以显著增强离线推理蒸馏效果，无需在线采样，为资源受限场景下提升小模型推理能力提供了有效路径。

title: Venus-DeFakerOne: Unified Fake Image Detection & Localization
summary: In recent years, the rapid evolution of generative AI has fundamentally reshaped the paradigm of image forgery, breaking the traditional boundaries between document editing, natural image manipulation, DeepFake generation, and full-image AIGC synthesis. Despite this shift toward unified forgery generation, existing research in Fake Image Detection and Localization (FIDL) remains fragmented. This creates a mismatch between increasingly unified forgery generation mechanisms and the domain-specific detection paradigm. Bridging this mismatch poses two key challenges for FIDL: understanding cross-domain artifacts transfer and interference, and building a high-capacity unified foundation model for joint detection and localization. To address these challenges, we propose DeFakerOne, a data-centric, unified FIDL foundation model integrating InternVL2 and SAM2. DeFakerOne enables simultaneous image-level detection and pixel-level forgery localization across diverse scenarios. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DeFakerOne achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming baselines on 39 forgery detection benchmarks and 9 localization benchmarks. Furthermore, the model exhibits superior robustness against real-world perturbations and state-of-the-art generators such as GPT-Image-2. Finally, we provide a systematic analysis of data scaling laws, cross-domain artifacts transfer-interference patterns, the necessity of fine-grained supervision, and the original resolution artifacts preservation, highlighting the design principles for scalable, robust, and unified FIDL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeFakerOne，一个基于InternVL2和SAM2的统一图像伪造检测与定位基础模型，在39个检测基准和9个定位基准上达到SOTA性能，并对跨域伪影迁移与干扰、数据缩放规律等进行了系统分析。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI的飞速发展使得图像伪造机制趋于统一，但现有的伪造图像检测与定位（FIDL）研究仍呈现碎片化、领域特定的范式，导致伪造生成机制与检测范式之间的错配。为解决这一 mismatch，需要理解跨域伪影的迁移与干扰，并构建高容量的统一基础模型。
AI.method: 提出DeFakerOne，一个数据驱动的统一FIDL基础模型，集成InternVL2和SAM2两个骨干网络，能够同时进行图像级检测和像素级伪造定位。
AI.result: 在39个伪造检测基准和9个定位基准上达到SOTA性能，展现出对现实扰动和最新生成器（如GPT-Image-2）的优越鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 系统分析了数据缩放规律、跨域伪影迁移-干扰模式、细粒度监督的必要性以及原始分辨率伪影保留等设计原则，为可扩展、鲁棒且统一的FIDL提供了重要指导。

title: Sheaf-Theoretic Transport and Obstruction for Detecting Scientific Theory Shift in AI Agents
summary: Scientific theory shift in AI agents requires more than fitting equations to data. An artificial scientific agent must detect whether an existing representational framework remains transportable into a new regime, or whether its language has become locally-to-globally obstructed and must be extended. This paper develops a finite sheaf-theoretic framework for detecting theory-shift candidates through transport and obstruction. Contexts are organized as a local-to-global structure in which source, overlap, target, and validation charts are fitted, restricted, and tested for gluing. Obstruction measures failure of coherence through residual fit, overlap incompatibility, constraint violation, limiting-relation failure, and representational cost. We evaluate the framework on a controlled transition-card benchmark designed to separate deformation within a source language from extension of that language. The main result is direct obstruction ranking: the intended deformation or extension is usually the lowest-obstruction candidate, and transition type is separated in the benchmark. A constellation kernel over the same signatures is included only as a secondary representational-similarity probe. The aim is not to reconstruct historical paradigm shifts or solve open-ended autonomous theory invention, but to isolate a finite diagnostic subproblem for AI agents: detecting when representational transport fails and extension becomes the coherent next move.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于层论（sheaf theory）的有限框架，用于检测AI智能体在科学理论迁移中的表征障碍，通过局部到全局的吻合与阻塞诊断判断是否需要扩展表征语言。
AI.motivation: 现有AI科学智能体主要关注将方程拟合到数据，但忽略了表征框架能否在新领域中保持可迁移性（transportability）。当局部表征无法全局一致时，需要检测"理论迁移候选"，即判断是变形（deformation）还是扩展（extension）。
AI.method: 构建有限层论框架：将上下文组织为源图表、重叠图表、目标图表和验证图表的局部-全局结构，通过吻合（gluing）测试检测障碍。障碍度量包括残差拟合、重叠不兼容性、约束违反、极限关系失败和表征成本五项指标。
AI.result: 在可控的转移卡片基准上，直接障碍排序方法能够将预期的变形或扩展识别为最低障碍候选，且转移类型在基准中可分离。作为对比的星座核（constellation kernel）仅作为次要的表征相似性探针。
AI.conclusion: 本文不是要重建历史范式转变或解决开放式自主理论发明，而是隔离出一个有限的诊断子问题：让AI智能体检测表征传输失败何时发生，以及何时扩展成为连贯的下一步行动。

title: Data-Augmented Game Starts for Accelerating Self-Play Exploration in Imperfect Information Games
comment: 17 pages, 4 figures. JB Lanier and Nathan Monette contributed equally
summary: Finding approximate equilibria for large-scale imperfect-information competitive games such as StarCraft, Dota, and CounterStrike remains computationally infeasible due to sparse rewards and challenging exploration over long horizons. In this paper, we propose a multi-agent starting-state sampling strategy designed to substantially accelerate online exploration in regularized policy-gradient game methods for two-player zero-sum (2p0s) games. Motivated by an assumption that offline demonstrations from skilled humans can provide good coverage of high-level strategies relevant to equilibrium play, we propose the initialization of reinforcement learning data collection at intermediate states sampled from offline data to facilitate exploration of strategically relevant subgames. Referring to this method as Data-Augmented Game Starts (DAGS), we perform experiments using synthetic datasets and analytically tractable, long-horizon control variants of two-player Kuhn Poker, Goofspiel, and a counterexample game designed to penalize biased beliefs over hidden information. Under fixed computational budgets, DAGS enables regularized policy gradient methods to achieve lower exploitability in games with significantly more challenging exploration. We show that augmenting starting state distributions when solving imperfect information games can lead to biased equilibria, and we provide a straightforward mitigation to this in the form of multi-task observation flags. Finally, we release a new set of benchmark environments that drastically increase exploration challenges and state counts in existing OpenSpiel games while keeping exploitability measurements analytically tractable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出数据增强游戏起始状态（DAGS）方法，通过在离线人类演示数据中采样中间状态来初始化强化学习数据收集，从而加速大规模不完美信息博弈中的探索，在固定计算预算下实现更低的可利用度。
AI.motivation: 大规模不完美信息博弈（如星际争霸、Dota、CS）因稀疏奖励和长视界探索难以计算近似均衡，现有方法在探索策略相关子博弈时效率低下。
AI.method: 利用离线人类演示数据提供的高层策略覆盖，从离线数据中的中间状态采样作为强化学习数据收集的初始状态；同时引入多任务观测标志来缓解起始状态分布变化导致的均衡偏差问题。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和可解析的长视界控制变体（Kuhn Poker、Goofspiel等）实验中，DAGS在固定计算预算下使正则化策略梯度方法在具有挑战性探索的游戏中实现更低的可利用度。
AI.conclusion: 数据增强起始状态可有效加速不完美信息博弈中的策略探索，但需注意均衡偏差问题；多任务观测标志可作为一种简单有效的缓解方案；同时发布了新的基准环境以促进相关研究。

title: A Unified Geometric Framework for Weighted Contrastive Learning
summary: Contrastive learning (CL) aims to preserve relational structure between samples by learning representations that reflect a similarity graph. Yet, the geometry of the resulting embeddings remains poorly understood. Here we show that weighted InfoNCE objectives can be interpreted as Distance Geometry Problems, where the weighting scheme specifies the target geometry to be realized by the representation. This viewpoint yields exact characterizations of the optimal embeddings for several supervised and weakly supervised objectives. In supervised classification, both SupCon and Soft SupCon (a dense relaxation of it where pairs from distinct classes have small non-zero similarity) collapse samples within each class to a single prototype. However, while balanced SupCon recovers the classical regular simplex geometry, class imbalance breaks this symmetry: SupCon induces non-uniform inter-class similarities depending on class sizes, whereas Soft SupCon preserves a regular simplex geometry regardless of class imbalance. In continuous-label settings, our framework reveals a different failure mode: y-Aware CL generally cannot attain its entropic optimum unless the labels lie on a hypersphere, exposing a mismatch between Euclidean label weights and spherical latent similarity. By contrast, geometrically consistent choices such as Euclidean-Euclidean weighting or X-CLR admit unique optimal embeddings. Our results show that the choice of weighting scheme determines whether contrastive learning is geometrically realizable, degenerate, or inconsistent, providing a principled framework for designing contrastive objectives.

AI.tldr: 本文通过将加权InfoNCE目标函数解释为距离几何问题，揭示了对比学习最优嵌入的几何特性，分析了不同加权方案下（如SupCon、Soft SupCon、y-Aware CL）嵌入的几何结构，并指出选择合适的加权方案对于实现几何可实现性至关重要。
AI.motivation: 对比学习旨在保持样本间的相对结构关系，但所得嵌入的几何性质尚不清楚。本文旨在通过距离几何视角，系统理解加权InfoNCE目标函数下最优嵌入的几何结构。
AI.method: 将加权InfoNCE目标函数重新解释为距离几何问题，通过理论分析推导出最优嵌入的精确刻画，并针对监督、弱监督和连续标签设置分别进行分析。
AI.result: (1) 监督分类中，SupCon在类别平衡时恢复经典正则单形体几何，类别不平衡时破坏对称性；Soft SupCon则无论类别是否平衡均保持正则单形体。(2) 连续标签设置中，y-Aware CL在标签位于超球面时才能达到熵最优，否则存在不匹配；而欧几里得-欧几里得加权或X-CLR可得到唯一最优嵌入。
AI.conclusion: 加权方案的选择决定了对比学习是否几何可实现、退化或不一致，为设计对比学习目标提供了理论指导框架。

title: Measuring and Mitigating Toxicity in Large Language Models: A Comprehensive Replication Study
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs), when trained on web-scale corpora, inherently absorb toxic patterns from their training data. This leads to ``toxic degeneration'' where even innocuous prompts can trigger harmful outputs. This phenomenon poses significant risks for real-world deployments. Thus, necessitating effective mitigation strategies that should maintain model utility while ensuring safety. In this comprehensive replication study, we evaluate the efficacy of \textbf{DExperts} (Decoding-time Experts), which is an inference-time mitigation technique that steers generation without requiring model retraining. We structured our research into three systematic phases: (1) establishing baseline toxicity measurements using \textbf{RealToxicityPrompts} on standard GPT-2 models; then (2) implementing and evaluating DExperts to mitigate explicit toxicity; and finally (3) stress-testing the method against implicit hate speech using the adversarial \textbf{ToxiGen} dataset. Our empirical results confirm that while DExperts achieves near-perfect safety rates (100\%) on explicit toxicity benchmarks, it exhibits brittleness against adversarial, implicit hate speech, with safety rates dropping to 98.5\%. Furthermore, we quantify a critical trade-off. The method introduces a $\sim$10x latency penalty (from 0.2s to 2.0s per generation), posing challenges for real-time deployment scenarios. This study contributes to the growing body of work on AI safety by highlighting the robustness gap between explicit and implicit toxicity mitigation. We emphasize the need for more sophisticated approaches that generalize across diverse hate speech patterns without prohibitive computational costs.

AI.tldr: 这项复制研究评估了DExperts（解码时专家）技术在减轻大语言模型毒性生成方面的效果。结果表明，DExperts在处理显式毒性时接近完美（安全率100%），但在对抗性隐式仇恨言论上表现脆弱（安全率降至98.5%），同时引入了约10倍的延迟惩罚（从0.2秒增至2.0秒）。研究揭示了显式与隐式毒性缓解之间的鲁棒性差距。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在训练中会吸收有毒模式，导致"毒性退化"现象——即使无害提示也可能触发有害输出。这对实际部署构成重大风险，因此需要在不损害模型效用的前提下，制定有效的毒性缓解策略。
AI.method: 研究分为三个阶段：(1) 使用RealToxicityPrompts在标准GPT-2模型上建立基线毒性测量；(2) 实施并评估DExperts以缓解显式毒性；(3) 使用对抗性ToxiGen数据集对隐式仇恨言论进行压力测试。DExperts是一种推理时缓解技术，通过解码时专家引导来避免模型重训练。
AI.result: DExperts在显式毒性基准上达到近乎完美的安全率（100%），但在对抗性隐式仇恨言论上安全率降至98.5%。同时，该方法引入了约10倍的延迟惩罚（从0.2秒增至2.0秒每次生成）。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了显式与隐式毒性缓解之间存在显著的鲁棒性差距，强调需要开发能够泛化到多种仇恨言论模式且计算成本更低的更复杂方法。

title: DUET: Dual-Paradigm Adaptive Expert Triage with Single-cell Inductive Prior for Spatial Transcriptomics Prediction
summary: Inferring spatially resolved gene expression from histology images offers a cost-effective complement to spatial transcriptomics (ST). However, existing methods reduce this task to a simple morphology-to-expression mapping, where visual similarity does not guarantee molecular consistency. Meanwhile, single-cell data has amassed rich resources far surpassing the scale of ST data, yet it remains underexplored in vision-omics modeling. Furthermore, current approaches commit to a monolithic paradigm with bottlenecks, unable to balance expressive flexibility with biological fidelity. To bridge these gaps, we propose DUET, a novel dual-paradigm framework that synergizes parametric prediction and memory-based retrieval under cellular inductive priors. DUET implements a parallel regression-retrieval paradigm, adaptively reconciling the outputs of its complementary pathways. To mitigate aleatoric vision ambiguity, we incorporate large-scale single-cell references to impose molecular states as biological constraints for faithful learning. Building upon structural refinement, we further design a lightweight adapter to dynamically assign branch preference across spatial contexts to achieve optimal performance. Extensive experiments on three public datasets across varied gene scales demonstrate that DUET achieves SOTA performance, with consistent gains contributed by each proposed component. Code is available at https://github.com/Junchao-Zhu/DUET

AI.tldr: DUET提出了一种双范式框架（参数化预测+记忆检索），结合单细胞参考数据，用于从组织学图像推断空间分辨基因表达，在三个数据集上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将任务简化为形态-表达映射，但视觉相似性不能保证分子一致性；单细胞数据资源丰富但未被充分利用；当前单一范式方法在表达灵活性和生物学保真度之间存在瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出DUET双范式框架：并行回归-检索通路，协同参数化预测和基于记忆的检索；引入大规模单细胞参考作为生物学约束；设计轻量级适配器实现空间上下文自适应分支偏好分配。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上、跨不同基因规模取得SOTA性能，每个组件均有持续增益贡献。
AI.conclusion: DUET通过双范式协同和单细胞约束有效解决了组织学图像到基因表达推断中的视觉-分子不一致问题，为空间转录组学提供了经济高效的替代方案。

title: From Descriptive to Prescriptive: Uncover the Social Value Alignment of LLM-based Agents
summary: Wide applications of LLM-based agents require strong alignment with human social values. However, current works still exhibit deficiencies in self-cognition and dilemma decision, as well as self-emotions. To remedy this, we propose a novel value-based framework that employs GraphRAG to convert principles into value-based instructions and steer the agent to behave as expected by retrieving the suitable instruction upon a specific conversation context. To evaluate the ratio of expected behaviors, we define the expected behaviors from two famous theories, Maslow's Hierarchy of Needs and Plutchik's Wheel of Emotion. By experimenting with our method on the benchmark of DAILYDILEMMAS, our method exhibits significant performance gains compared to prompt-based baselines, including ECoT, Plan-and-Solve, and Metacognitive prompting. Our method provides a basis for the emergence of self-emotion in AI systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于价值框架的方法，利用GraphRAG将原则转化为价值指令，通过检索合适指令引导LLM代理行为，在DAILYDILEMMAS基准上显著优于ECoT、Plan-and-Solve等提示方法，为AI系统自我情感涌现提供基础。
AI.motivation: 当前基于LLM的智能体在自我认知、困境决策和情感表达方面存在不足，缺乏与人类社会价值观的强对齐。
AI.method: 提出价值驱动框架，使用GraphRAG将原则转化为价值指令，根据对话上下文检索适用指令来引导智能体行为；以马斯洛需求层次理论和Plutchik情绪轮为理论基础定义期望行为。
AI.result: 在DAILYDILEMMAS基准上，该方法相较于ECoT、Plan-and-Solve和元认知提示等基线方法，在期望行为比例上取得显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 该价值框架有效提升了LLM智能体的社会价值对齐能力，并为AI系统自我情感的出现奠定了基础。

title: Prompting Policies for Multi-step Reasoning and Tool-Use in Black-box LLMs with Iterative Distillation of Experience
summary:
The shift toward interacting with frozen, "black-box" Large Language Models (LLMs) has transformed prompt engineering from a heuristic exercise into a critical optimization challenge. We propose a Reinforcement Learning (RL) framework for training learned prompting policies via iterative distillation of experience. In this architecture, a lightweight prompter model is optimized to maximize task-specific rewards for a larger, frozen worker LLM. By utilizing a contrastive experience buffer that couples scalar rewards with dense textual critiques, our approach effectively amortizes iterative prompt refinement into single-shot policy weights.
  Our experimental analysis focuses on the Big Bench Extra Hard (BBEH) and Tau-bench suites, covering a diverse range of multi-step reasoning and tool-use tasks. We demonstrate significant gains, improving performance from 55% to 90% in logic-intensive reasoning and 74% to 91% in tool-use tasks. Furthermore, we analyze the structural evolution of prompts, demonstrating how the policy discovers specialized algorithmic heuristics. We provide comprehensive comparisons against state-of-the-art evolutionary baselines like GEPA, showing that iterative distillation achieves superior performance with higher sample efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于强化学习的迭代蒸馏框架，通过轻量级prompter模型为冻结的大语言模型生成优化提示，在BBEH和Tau-bench基准上显著提升了多步推理和工具使用任务的性能（如逻辑推理从55%提升至90%）。
AI.motivation: 将提示工程从启发式试错转变为可优化的学习问题，解决与冻结黑盒大模型交互时提示优化的关键挑战。
AI.method: 提出强化学习框架，通过对比经验缓冲区（结合标量奖励和密集文本批评）迭代蒸馏经验，将迭代提示优化过程摊销为单次策略权重。
AI.result: 在BBEH基准上逻辑推理任务从55%提升至90%，工具使用任务从74%提升至91%，在样本效率上超越进化算法GEPA等基线。
AI.conclusion: 迭代蒸馏框架能高效学习提示策略，发现专门的算法启发式结构，为黑盒大模型提示优化提供了可扩展的解决方案。

title: Collider-Bench: Benchmarking AI Agents with Particle Physics Analysis Reproduction
comment: 23 pages | 9 figures | 4 tables | Code: https://github.com/dfaroughy/Collider-Bench | Task Corpus: https://huggingface.co/datasets/Dariusfar/ColliderBench
summary: Autonomous language-model agents are increasingly evaluated on long-horizon tool-use tasks, but existing benchmarks rarely capture the complexity and nuance of real scientific work. To address this gap, we introduce Collider-Bench, a benchmark for evaluating whether LLM agents can reproduce experimental analyses from the Large Hadron Collider (LHC) using only public papers and open scientific software. Such analyses are often difficult to reproduce because the public toolchain only approximates the software used internally by the experimental collaborations, while the published papers inevitably omit implementation details needed for a faithful reconstruction. Agents must therefore rely on physical reasoning, domain knowledge, and trial-and-error to fill these gaps. Each task requires the agent to turn a published analysis into an executable simulation-and-selection pipeline and submit predicted collision event yields in specified signal regions. These predictions are evaluated with standard histogram metrics that provide continuous fidelity scores without a hand-written rubric. We also report the computational cost incurred by each agent per task. Finally, we evaluate the codebase and full session trace using an LLM judge to catch qualitative failure modes such as fabrications, hallucinations and duplications. We release an initial set of tasks drawn from LHC searches, together with a containerized sandbox and event simulation tools. We evaluate across a capability ladder of general purpose coding agents. Our results show that on average no agent reliably beats the physicist-in-the-loop solution.

AI.tldr: 提出Collider-Bench基准，评估LLM代理能否利用公开论文和科学软件复现大型强子对撞机(LHC)的实验分析，涵盖长周期工具使用、物理推理和试错过程。
AI.motivation: 现有基准难以捕捉真实科学工作的复杂性与细微差别，尤其是LHC实验分析因工具链近似性及论文细节缺失而难以复现，需评估AI代理填补这些gap的能力。
AI.method: 构建Collider-Bench基准：要求代理将已发表分析转化为可执行的模拟-选择流水线，预测指定信号区的事件产额；使用直方图指标连续评分、计算成本追踪，并引入LLM裁判审查代码与日志以检测伪造、幻觉和重复等失效模式。
AI.result: 在通用编码代理的能力阶梯上评估，平均而言没有代理能稳定超越"物理学家参与"（physicist-in-the-loop）的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 当前通用AI代理在复现LHC实验分析这一复杂科学任务上仍有显著不足，物理学家仍不可或缺；Collider-Bench为未来科学助手的发展提供了具有挑战性的测试平台。

title: When Evidence Conflicts: Uncertainty and Order Effects in Retrieval-Augmented Biomedical Question Answering
summary: Biomedical retrieval-augmented large language models (LLMs) often face evidence that is incomplete, misleading, or internally contradictory, yet evaluation usually emphasizes answer accuracy under helpful context rather than reliability under conflict. Using HealthContradict, we evaluate six open-weight LLMs under five controlled evidence conditions: no retrieved context, correct-only context, incorrect-only context, and two mixed conditions containing both correct and contradictory documents in opposite orders. In this conflicting-evidence order contrast, where the same two documents are both present and only their order is reversed, accuracy drops for every model and 11.4%--25.2% of predictions flip. To support abstention in these difficult cases, we also evaluate a conflict-aware abstention score that combines model confidence with a detector of evidence conflict. In the two hardest conditions, this score improves selective accuracy over confidence-only, with mean gains of 7.2--33.4 points in incorrect-only (`IC') and 3.6--14.4 points in incorrect-first conflicting (`ICC') conditions across 75%, 50%, and 25% coverage. These results show that conflicting biomedical evidence is both an uncertainty and robustness problem and motivate evaluation and abstention methods that explicitly account for evidence disagreement.

AI.tldr: 研究了生物医学检索增强LLM在矛盾证据下的表现，提出冲突感知的弃权评分方法，在矛盾条件下显著提升了选择性准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有评估只关注有帮助上下文下的答案准确性，忽视了检索到的证据可能不完整、误导或内部矛盾的问题，缺乏对LLM在证据冲突下可靠性的评估。
AI.method: 构建HealthContradict数据集，设置五种证据条件（无上下文、仅正确、仅错误、两种混合顺序），评估6个开源LLM。提出结合模型置信度与证据冲突检测器的冲突感知弃权评分。
AI.result: 证据顺序颠倒导致所有模型准确率下降，11.4%-25.2%的预测翻转。冲突感知弃权评分在IC和ICC条件下，在75%、50%、25%覆盖率下选择性准确率分别提升7.2-33.4和3.6-14.4个点。
AI.conclusion: 矛盾生物医学证据既是不确定性也是鲁棒性问题，需要明确考虑证据不一致的评估和弃权方法。

title: Bridging the Rural Healthcare Gap: A Cascaded Edge-Cloud Architecture for Automated Retinal Screening
summary: Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) is one of the leading causes of preventable blindness, yet rural regions often lack the specialists and infrastructure needed for early detection. Although cloud-based deep learning systems offer high accuracy, they face significant challenges in these settings due to high latency, limited bandwidth, and high data transmission costs. To address these challenges, we propose a two-tier edge-cloud cascade on the public APTOS 2019 Blindness Detection dataset. Tier 1 runs a lightweight MobileNetV3-small model on a local clinic device to perform a binary triage between Referable DR (Classes 2-4) and Non-referable DR (Classes 0-1). Tier 2 runs a RETFoundDINOv2 model in the cloud for ordinal severity grading, but only on the subset of images flagged as referable by Tier 1. On a stratified APTOS test split of 733 images, Tier 1 reaches 98.99% sensitivity and 84.37% specificity at a validation-tuned high-sensitivity threshold. The default cascade forwards 49.52% of test images to Tier 2, reducing cloud calls by 50.48% relative to using a cloud-based model for all images. In the deployed 4-class output space (Class 0-1 / Class 2 / Class 3 / Class 4), the cascade obtains 80.49% accuracy and 0.8167 quadratic weighted kappa; the cloud-only baseline obtains 80.76% accuracy and 0.8184 quadratic weighted kappa. On APTOS, the cascade cuts cloud use by about half with a modest drop in grading performance. Index Terms: Diabetic Retinopathy, Edge-Cloud Cascade, MobileNetV3-small, RETFound-DINOv2, Retinal Screening, tele-ophthalmology

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个两阶段边缘-云级联系统用于糖尿病视网膜病变筛查：边缘端用轻量级MobileNetV3-small进行二分类分流（是否可转诊），云端用RETFoundDINOv2对阳性样本进行严重程度分级。在APTOS数据集上，该系统将云端调用减少约50%，性能仅略微下降。
AI.motivation: 农村地区缺乏DR筛查专家和基础设施；纯云端深度学习系统存在高延迟、带宽有限、数据传输成本高等问题，不适合资源受限的偏远地区。
AI.method: 两层级联架构：Tier 1在本地设备运行MobileNetV3-small，对DR图像进行二分类分流（可转诊DR vs 不可转诊DR）；Tier 2仅在Tier 1判定为阳性的图像上，调用云端RETFoundDINOv2进行序数严重程度分级（4类输出）。
AI.result: Tier 1在733张测试集上灵敏度98.99%、特异度84.37%；级联系统将49.52%图像转发至云端，减少50.48%云端调用；4分类准确率80.49%、QWK 0.8167，云端基线为80.76%准确率、QWK 0.8184。
AI.conclusion: 该边缘-云级联方案在保证高灵敏度的前提下，大幅减少云端调用（约50%），仅带来微小的分级性能下降，适合资源受限的农村远程眼科筛查场景。

title: Enhanced and Efficient Reasoning in Large Learning Models
summary:
In current Large Language Models we can trust the production of smoothly flowing prose on the basis of the principles of machine learning. However, there is no comparably principled basis to justify trust in the content of the text produced. It appears to be conventional wisdom that addressing this issue by adding more principled reasoning is not computationally affordable.
  Here we propose a principled method of reasoning that is efficient enough to be practical for large language models. Further, the method allows the retention of much of the currently used software and hardware base. Our method for improving the functioning of large language models consists of a first stage of preprocessing that recodes the data to a Unary Relational Integracode that is more explicit about the relationships among the objects described in the text, followed as a second stage by a standard but possibly streamlined machine learning process that then also learns to predict these relationships.
  The method may be viewed as realizing a world model and applying beyond natural language, to vision and actions, for example, where the multiple properties of an object referred to in an input are brought together explicitly, rather than remaining distributed in the various references to it in the input. We articulate its advantages in terms of Robust Logic, a system for performing principled chaining on learned, and hence uncertain, information. We show that this recoding has the surprising and fortuitous property that, while succinct, it makes the task of learning a core subset of relational rules that hold in the world described in the training data polynomial time learnable in a defined sense, the polynomial depending on the complexity of the rule. This gives support for sound reasoning within each single call of the learned classifier as well as between multiple calls.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为"一元关系集成编码"（Unary Relational Integracode）的高效推理方法，通过将数据预处理为更显式的关系表示，使得大语言模型能够在保持现有软硬件基础的前提下，实现可信任的内容生成和原则性推理，同时证明该方法使关系规则学习在多项式时间内可完成。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型能生成流畅文本，但缺乏对内容可信度的原则性保障。现有共识认为增加原则性推理在计算上不可行，本文旨在解决这一矛盾，提出计算上可行的方法来增强模型推理的可信度。
AI.method: 两阶段方法：第一阶段对数据进行预处理，将其重新编码为"一元关系集成编码"，使文本中描述的对象间关系更加显式化；第二阶段使用标准（可能经过精简）的机器学习过程，学习预测这些关系。
AI.result: 该方法具有令人意外的特性：简洁的编码使学习训练数据中描述世界的关系规则子集在多项式时间内可学习（多项式复杂度取决于规则的复杂性），从而支持单次和多次调用分类器时的可靠推理。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可被视为实现了一种世界模型，不仅适用于自然语言，还可扩展到视觉和动作等领域，通过"稳健逻辑"系统进行原则性推理链，为构建可信赖的大语言模型提供了可行路径。

title: AI Knows When It's Being Watched: Functional Strategic Action and Contextual Register Modulation in Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have been extensively studied from computational and cognitive perspectives, yet their behavior as communicative actors in socially structured contexts remains underexplored. This study examines whether LLM-based multi-agent systems exhibit systematic linguistic adaptation in response to perceived social observation contexts -- a question with direct implications for AI governance and auditing. Drawing on Habermas's (1981) Theory of Communicative Action, Goffman's (1959) dramaturgical model, Bell's (1984) Audience Design framework, and the Hawthorne Effect, we report a controlled experiment involving 100 multi-agent debate sessions across five conditions (n = 20 each). Conditions varied the framing of social observation -- from explicit monitoring by university researchers, to negation of monitoring, to an observer-substitution condition replacing human researchers with an automated AI auditing system. Monitored conditions (Delta+24.9%, Delta+24.2%) and the automated AI monitoring condition (Delta+22.2%) produce higher TTR change than audience-framing conditions (Delta+17.7%), F(4, 94) = 2.79, p = .031. Message length shows a fully dissociated effect, F(4, 95) = 19.55, p < .001. A fifth condition -- replacing human with AI observers -- yields intermediate TTR adaptation, suggesting LLM behavior is sensitive to observer identity: human evaluation elicits stronger register formalization than automated AI surveillance. We discuss implications for AI governance, algorithmic auditing, and the repositioning of LLMs as contextually sensitive communicative actors.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过100场多智能体辩论实验，发现基于LLM的多智能体系统在感知到社会观察情境时（如被人类研究者监控 vs. 被AI系统监控），会表现出系统性的语言适应行为——监测条件下词汇多样性（TTR）提升更显著（+24.9%），而受众框架条件下提升较小（+17.7%）。消息长度则表现出完全分离的效应。这一发现对AI治理和算法审计具有启示意义。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多从计算和认知视角探讨LLM，但对其在社会结构化情境中作为沟通行为主体的表现关注不足。本研究旨在检验LLM多智能体系统是否会因感知到的社会观察情境而产生系统的语言适应行为，以回应AI治理和审计中的实际问题。
AI.method: 采用控制实验设计，设置100场多智能体辩论会话，分为5种条件（各n=20）：明确监控（大学研究者监控）、否定监控、受众框架（如对特定听众发言）、以及将人类观察者替换为自动化AI审计系统的条件。测量词汇多样性（TTR）变化和消息长度变化等指标。
AI.result: 监测条件（Delta+24.9%, Delta+24.2%）和自动化AI监控条件（Delta+22.2%）下的TTR变化显著高于受众框架条件（Delta+17.7%），F(4,94)=2.79, p=.031。消息长度则表现出完全分离的效应，F(4,95)=19.55, p<.001。AI观察者条件呈现中间程度的TTR适应，表明LLM对人类评价比自动化AI监控更敏感。
AI.conclusion: LLM在感知到社会观察情境时会产生语言适应行为，且对观察者身份（人类 vs. AI）敏感。这对AI治理、算法审计以及将LLM定位为情境敏感的沟通行为主体具有重要意义。

title: WarmPrior: Straightening Flow-Matching Policies with Temporal Priors
summary: Generative policies based on diffusion and flow matching have become a dominant paradigm for visuomotor robotic control. We show that replacing the standard Gaussian source distribution with WarmPrior, a simple temporally grounded prior constructed from readily available recent action history, consistently improves success rates on robotic manipulation tasks. We trace this gain to markedly straighter probability paths, echoing the effect of optimal-transport couplings in Rectified Flow. Beyond standard behavior cloning, WarmPrior also reshapes the exploration distribution in prior-space reinforcement learning, improving both sample efficiency and final performance. Collectively, these results identify the source distribution as an important and underexplored design axis in generative robot control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出WarmPrior方法，用基于近期动作历史的时间接地先验替代标准高斯分布，显著提升机器人操控任务成功率，并改善概率路径的直线度，同时在行为克隆和强化学习中均带来性能提升，揭示了生成式机器人控制中源分布这一被忽视的设计维度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型和流匹配的机器人控制方法都使用标准高斯分布作为源分布，但高斯分布是"无信息"的，没有利用任务本身的时间结构信息，作者意图探究更好的源分布设计来提升生成式机器人控制性能。
AI.method: 提出WarmPrior——一种简单的时间接地先验，利用近期动作历史构建源分布替代标准高斯分布，使概率路径更接近直线（类似于Rectified Flow中最优输运耦合的效果），并在行为克隆和prior-space强化学习中验证其有效性。
AI.result: WarmPrior一致性地提升了机器人操控任务的成功率，路径直线度显著改善，同时在强化学习中提升了样本效率和最终性能。
AI.conclusion: 源分布是生成式机器人控制中一个重要但被忽视的设计维度，WarmPrior作为一种简单有效的改进方案，值得在该领域进一步探索。

title: Generative Floor Plan Design with LLMs via Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards
summary: An AI system for professional floor plan design must precisely control room dimensions and areas while respecting the desired connectivity between rooms and maintaining functional and aesthetic quality. Existing generative approaches focus primarily on respecting the requested connectivity between rooms, but do not support generating floor plans that respect numerical constraints. We introduce a text-based floor plan generation approach that fine-tunes a large language model (LLM) on real plans and then applies reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) to improve adherence to topological and numerical constraints while discouraging invalid or overlapping outputs. Furthermore, we design a set of constraint adherence metrics to systematically measure how generated floor plans align with user-defined constraints. Our model generates floor plans that satisfy user-defined connectivity and numerical constraints and outperforms existing methods on Realism, Compatibility, and Diversity metrics. Across all tasks, our approach achieves at least a 94% relative reduction in Compatibility compared with existing methods. Our results demonstrate that LLMs can effectively handle constraints in this setting, suggesting broader applications for text-based generative modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于文本的户型图生成方法，通过微调大语言模型（LLM）并应用带有可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR），在满足拓扑关系和数值约束（如房间尺寸、面积）的同时生成高质量的户型图。该方法在Realism、Compatibility和Diversity指标上优于现有方法，兼容性相对提升至少94%。
AI.motivation: 现有户型图生成方法主要关注房间之间的连接关系（拓扑约束），但无法支持对房间尺寸、面积等数值约束的精确控制。作者希望解决这一不足，使AI系统能够同时满足拓扑和数值双重约束。
AI.method: 1. 在真实户型图上微调大语言模型（LLM）；2. 应用带有可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）来提升对拓扑和数值约束的遵循程度，同时抑制无效或重叠的输出；3. 设计了一套约束遵循度量指标，用于系统评估生成户型图与用户定义约束的匹配程度。
AI.result: 生成的户型图能够同时满足用户定义的连接性和数值约束；在Realism、Compatibility、Diversity指标上均优于现有方法；在所有任务中，兼容性相对改善至少94%。
AI.conclusion: LLM能够有效处理户型图生成中的复杂约束问题，展示了文本生成建模在空间设计领域的更广泛应用潜力。

title: SToRe3D: Sparse Token Relevance in ViTs for Efficient Multi-View 3D Object Detection
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) enable strong multi-view 3D detection but are limited by high inference latency from dense token and query processing across multiple views and large 3D regions. Existing sparsity methods, designed mainly for 2D vision, prune or merge image tokens but do not extend to full-model sparsity or address 3D object queries. We introduce SToRe3D, a relevance-aligned sparsity framework that jointly selects 2D image tokens and 3D object queries while storing filtered features for reactivation. Mutual 2D-3D relevance heads allocate compute to driving-critical content and preserve other embeddings. Evaluated on nuScenes and our new nuScenes-Relevance benchmark, SToRe3D achieves up to 3x faster inference with marginal accuracy loss, establishing real-time large-scale ViT-based 3D detection while maintaining accuracy on planning-critical agents.

AI.tldr: SToRe3D是一个针对视觉Transformer多视图3D检测的联合稀疏化框架，通过互注意力机制同时筛选2D图像token和3D物体查询，实现最高3倍加速且精度损失极小。
AI.motivation: ViT在3D检测中推理延迟高，现有稀疏方法局限于2D视觉，无法覆盖全模型稀疏以及3D查询的优化。
AI.method: 提出互2D-3D相关性注意力头，联合选择重要token和查询，并存储过滤特征用于后续重激活。
AI.result: 在nuScenes及新提出的nuScenes-Relevance基准上，实现最高3倍推理加速，精度损失极小，在规划关键目标上保持准确率。
AI.conclusion: SToRe3D实现了实时大规模ViT-based 3D检测，兼顾效率与准确性，尤其在驾驶关键场景中表现良好。

title: Model-Adaptive Tool Necessity Reveals the Knowing-Doing Gap in LLM Tool Use
summary: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly act as autonomous agents that must decide when to answer directly vs. when to invoke external tools. Prior work studying adaptive tool use has largely treated tool necessity as a model-agnostic property, annotated by human or LLM judge, and mostly cover cases where the answer is obvious (e.g., fetching the weather vs. paraphrasing text). However, tool necessity in the wild is more nuanced due to the divergence of capability boundaries across models: a problem solvable by a strong model on its own may still require tools for a weaker one. In this work, we introduce a model-adaptive definition of tool-necessity, grounded in each model's empirical performance. Following this definition, we compare the necessity against observed tool-call behavior across four models on arithmetic and factual QA dataset, and find substantial mismatches of 26.5-54.0% and 30.8-41.8%, respectively. To diagnose the failure, we decompose tool use into two stages: an internal cognition stage that reflects whether a model believes a tool is necessary, and an execution stage that determines whether the model actually makes a tool-call action. By probing the LLM hidden states, we find that both signals are often linearly decodable, yet their probe directions become nearly orthogonal in the late-layer, last-token regime that drives the next-token action. By tracing the trajectory of samples in the two-stage process, we further discover that the majority of mismatch is concentrated in the cognition-to-action transition, not in cognition itself. These results reveal a knowing-doing gap in LLM tool-use: improving tool-use reliability requires not only better recognition of when tools are needed, but also better translation of that recognition into action.

AI.tldr: 本文提出模型自适应的工具必要性定义，发现LLMs在工具使用中存在显著的"知道-行动"鸿沟：模型虽能在隐状态中编码工具需求信号，但将这些信号转化为实际行动时出现大量失配，主要问题出在认知到行动的转换阶段而非认知本身。
AI.motivation: 现有工具必要性研究多将工具需求视为与模型无关的属性，但不同模型能力边界差异巨大（强模型无需工具而弱模型需要），亟需一种模型自适应的工具必要性定义来更准确地评估LLM的工具使用行为。
AI.method: 1. 提出基于模型经验性能的模型自适应工具必要性定义；2. 在算术和事实QA数据集上对比四个模型的工具调用行为与必要性之间的匹配度；3. 将工具使用分解为内部认知阶段和执行阶段；4. 通过探针分析LLM隐状态，研究两阶段信号的线性可解码性及其正交性。
AI.result: 1. 四个模型在算术和事实QA任务上分别有26.5-54.0%和30.8-41.8%的失配率；2. 内部认知信号和执行信号均可线性解码，但在驱动下一词元动作的深层-末词元区域中探针方向几乎正交；3. 大部分失配集中在认知到行动的转换阶段。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了LLM工具使用中的"知道-行动"鸿沟：提升工具使用可靠性不仅需要更好的工具需求识别能力，更需要将这种识别有效转化为实际行动的能力。

title: APWA: A Distributed Architecture for Parallelizable Agentic Workflows
summary: Autonomous multi-agent systems based on large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable abilities in independently solving complex tasks in a wide breadth of application domains. However, these systems hit critical reasoning, coordination, and computational scaling bottlenecks as the size and complexity of their tasks grow. These limitations hinder multi-agent systems from achieving high-throughput processing for highly parallelizable tasks, despite the availability of parallel computing and reasoning primitives in the underlying LLMs. We introduce the Agent-Parallel Workload Architecture (APWA), a distributed multi-agent system architecture designed for the efficient processing of heavily parallelizable agentic workloads. APWA facilitates parallel execution by decomposing workflows into non-interfering subproblems that can be processed using independent resources without cross-communication. It supports heterogeneous data and parallel processing patterns, and it accommodates tasks from a wide breadth of domains. In our evaluation, we demonstrate that APWA can dynamically decompose complex queries into parallelizable workflows and scales on larger tasks in settings where prior systems fail completely.

AI.tldr: 本文提出APWA架构，一种分布式多智能体系统设计，通过将工作流分解为可并行处理的非干扰子问题，实现了对高度可并行化任务的高效扩展处理，解决了现有LLM多智能体系统在推理、协调和计算扩展方面的瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的多智能体系统在任务规模和复杂度增长时，面临推理、协调和计算扩展瓶颈，无法高效处理高度可并行化的任务，尽管底层LLM具备并行计算和推理原语。
AI.method: 提出Agent-Parallel Workload Architecture (APWA)，一种分布式多智能体系统架构。核心思路是将工作流分解为非干扰子问题，各子问题使用独立资源并行处理，无需跨通信，支持异构数据和多种并行处理模式。
AI.result: APWA能够动态将复杂查询分解为可并行化的工作流，在更大规模任务上实现扩展，而现有系统在此类场景下完全失败。
AI.conclusion: APWA架构有效解决了多智能体系统在并行任务处理上的扩展瓶颈问题，为高吞吐量的并行智能体工作负载提供了可行的系统设计方案。

title: Towards Resource-Efficient LLMs: End-to-End Energy Accounting of Distillation Pipelines
comment: Accepted to the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026). 11 pages, 6 figures
summary: The rise in deployment of large language models has driven a surge in GPU demand and datacenter scaling, raising concerns about electricity use, grid stress, and the impacts of modern AI workloads. Distillation is often promoted as one of the most effective paths to obtain cheaper, more efficient models, yet these claims rarely account for the full end-to-end energy and resource costs, including crucial teacher-side workloads such as data generation, logit caching, and evaluation. We present a comprehensive energy accounting framework that measures the complete computational cost of distillation pipelines via detailed stage-wise tracking of GPU device power consumption. In our experiments, we separate and log empirical energy use across distinct phases and systematically measure the energy and emissions of two common distillation methods: the classic logit-based knowledge distillation and synthetic-data supervised fine-tuning, constructing energy-quality Pareto frontiers that expose the previously ignored costs. From these measurements and analyses, we derive practical design rules for selecting distillation methods and hyperparameters under energy and budget constraints, and release an open-source measurement harness and accounting protocol to provide a standardized foundation for comparable, reproducible distillation research, explicitly accountable for complete pipeline energy impact.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个全面的能量核算框架，用于测量蒸馏管道的完整计算成本，揭示了蒸馏过程中被忽视的教师侧能耗，并构建了能量-质量帕累托边界，为在能量和预算约束下选择蒸馏方法和超参数提供了实用设计规则。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型部署激增导致GPU需求和数据中心规模扩大，引发对电力消耗和电网压力的担忧。蒸馏虽被宣传为获取更便宜、更高效模型的有效途径，但现有研究很少考虑端到端的能源和资源成本，尤其是教师侧的数据生成、logit缓存和评估等工作负载。
AI.method: 提出了一个全面的能量核算框架，通过详细的阶段级GPU设备功耗跟踪来测量蒸馏管道的完整计算成本。在实验中分离并记录了不同阶段的实际能耗，系统测量了两种常见蒸馏方法（基于logit的知识蒸馏和基于合成数据的监督微调）的能量和排放，构建了能量-质量帕累托边界。
AI.result: 揭示了蒸馏过程中之前被忽视的教师侧能耗成本，构建了能量-质量帕累托边界，展示了不同蒸馏方法和超参数在能量与质量之间的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 得出了在能量和预算约束下选择蒸馏方法和超参数的实用设计规则，并开源了测量工具和核算协议，为可比较、可复现的蒸馏研究提供标准化基础。

title: Polar probe linearly decodes semantic structures from LLMs
summary: How do artificial neural networks bind concepts to form complex semantic structures? Here, we propose a simple neural code, whereby the existence and the type of relations between entities are represented by the distance and the direction between their embeddings, respectively. We test this hypothesis in a variety of Large Language Models (LLMs), each input with natural-language descriptions of minimalist tasks from five different domains: arithmetic, visual scenes, family trees, metro maps and social interactions. Results show that the true semantic structures can be linearly recovered with a Polar Probe targeting a subspace of LLMs' layer activations. Second, this code emerges mostly in middle layers and improves with LLM performance. Third, these Polar Probes successfully generalize to new entities and relation types, but degrades with the size of the semantic structure. Finally, the quality of the polar representation correlates with the LLM's ability to answer questions about the semantic structure. Together, these findings suggest that LLMs learn to build complex semantic structures by binding representations with a simple geometrical principle.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种神经编码假说：实体间关系的存在与类型分别由嵌入向量的距离和方向表示。在多种LLM中通过Polar Probe方法验证，发现该编码主要出现在中间层，与模型性能正相关，且能泛化到新实体和关系类型，但随结构复杂度下降。
AI.motivation: 探索人工神经网络如何将概念绑定形成复杂的语义结构，揭示LLM内部表示的基本几何原理。
AI.method: 提出"极坐标探针"（Polar Probe）方法，在LLM的激活层子空间中线性恢复语义结构，通过距离编码关系存在、方向编码关系类型。
AI.result: 1) 语义结构可被Polar Probe线性恢复；2) 该编码主要出现在中间层，随模型性能提升而增强；3) 可泛化到新实体和关系类型，但随结构规模扩大而退化；4) 极坐标表示质量与LLM回答语义结构问题的能力相关。
AI.conclusion: LLM通过简单的几何原则（距离和方向）来绑定表示，构建复杂的语义结构。

title: Network-Aware Bilinear Tokenization for Brain Functional Connectivity Representation Learning
summary: Masked autoencoders (MAEs) have recently shown promise for self-supervised representation learning of resting-state brain functional connectivity (FC). However, a fundamental question remains unresolved: how should FC matrices be tokenized to align with the intrinsic modular organization of large-scale brain networks? Existing approaches typically adopt region-centric or graph-based schemes that treat FC as structurally homogeneous elements and overlook the large-scale network brain organization. We introduce NERVE (Network-Aware Representations of Brain Functional Connectivity via Bilinear Tokenization), a self-supervised learning framework that redefines FC tokenization by partitioning FC matrices into patches of intra- and inter-network connectivity blocks. Unlike image-based MAE, where fixed-size patches share a common tokenizer, FC patches defined by network pairs are heterogeneous in size and correspond to distinct functional roles. To resolve this problem, NERVE embeds FC patches through a novel structured bilinear factorization. This formulation preserves network identity and reduces parameter complexity from quadratic to linear scaling in the number of networks. We evaluate NERVE across three large-scale developmental cohorts (ABCD, PNC, and CCNP) for behavior and psychopathology prediction. Compared to structurally agnostic MAE variants and graph-based self-supervised baselines, the proposed network-aware formulation yields more stable and transferable representations, particularly in cross-cohort evaluation. Ablation studies confirm that the proposed bilinear network embedding and anatomically grounded parcellation are critical for performance. These findings highlight the importance of incorporating domain-specific structural priors into self-supervised learning for functional connectomics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NERVE框架，通过双线性分解将功能连接矩阵按脑网络模块划分成异质块进行自监督学习，在三个大规模数据集上相比现有方法取得了更稳定和可迁移的表征。
AI.motivation: 现有MAE方法将FC矩阵视为结构均匀的元素进行令牌化，忽略了大脑功能网络固有的模块化组织（如网络内/网络间连接的不同功能角色），需要一种能对齐脑网络组织的令牌化方案。
AI.method: NERVE将FC矩阵按脑网络对划分为异质的网络内/网络间补丁，并提出结构化双线性分解（bilinear factorization）来嵌入这些补丁，保持网络身份信息的同时将参数复杂度从二次降至线性。然后基于MAE进行自监督预训练。
AI.result: 在ABCD、PNC和CCNP三个大规模发展队列的行为与精神病理预测任务上，NERVE优于结构无关的MAE变体和基于图的自监督基线，尤其在跨队列评估中表现更稳定和可迁移；消融实验验证了双线性网络嵌入和解剖学分区的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 融入领域特定的结构先验（脑网络模块化组织）对功能连接组学的自监督学习至关重要，NERVE为脑功能连接表征学习提供了一种更符合神经科学原理的范式。

title: TabPFN-3: Technical Report
summary: Tabular data underpins most high-value prediction problems in science and industry, and TabPFN has driven the foundation model revolution for this modality. Designed with feedback from our users, TabPFN-3 builds on this foundation to scale state-of-the-art performance to datasets with 1M training rows and substantially reduce training and inference time. Pretrained exclusively on synthetic data from our prior, TabPFN-3 dramatically pushes the frontier of tabular prediction and brings substantial gains on time series, relational, and tabular-text data. On the standard tabular benchmark TabArena, a forward pass of TabPFN-3 outperforms all other models, including tuned and ensembled baselines, by a significant margin, and pareto-dominates the speed/performance frontier. On more diverse datasets, TabPFN-3 ranks first on datasets with many classes, and beats 8-hour-tuned gradient-boosted-tree baselines on datasets up to 1M training rows and 200 features. TabPFN-3 introduces test-time compute scaling to tabular foundation models. Our API offering TabPFN-3-Plus (Thinking) exploits this to beat all non-TabPFN models by over 200 Elo on TabArena, rising to 420 Elo on the largest data subset, and outperforms AutoGluon 1.5 extreme while being 10x faster, without using LLMs, real data, internet search or any other model besides TabPFN. TabPFN-3 extends the capabilities of our models, enabling SOTA prediction on relational data (new SOTA foundation model on RelBenchV1) and tabular-text data (SOTA on TabSTAR via TabPFN-3-Plus); and improves existing integrations: a specialized checkpoint, TabPFN-TS-3, ranks 2nd on the time-series benchmark fev-bench, and SHAP-value computation is up to 120x faster. TabPFN-3 achieves this performance while being up to 20x faster than TabPFN-2.5. In addition, a reduced KV cache and row-chunking scale to 1M rows on one H100 with fast inference speed.

AI.tldr: TabPFN-3是专为表格数据设计的基础模型，通过纯合成数据预训练，在百万级数据上达到SOTA性能，推理速度比前代快20倍，并在时间序列、关系数据和表格-文本数据上均有显著提升。其API版本TabPFN-3-Plus（Thinking）通过测试时计算扩展，在TabArena上以200+ Elo优势碾压所有非TabPFN模型，比AutoGluon 1.5 extreme快10倍。
AI.motivation: 表格数据是科学与工业领域高价值预测问题的核心，现有TabPFN已奠定基础模型地位，但面临大规模数据扩展、训练推理效率提升以及更广泛数据模态（时间序列、关系数据、表格-文本）的挑战。基于用户反馈，需要进一步突破性能边界。
AI.method: 1) 仅在合成的先验数据上预训练；2) 支持100万训练行、200特征的扩展能力；3) 引入测试时计算扩展（test-time compute scaling）；4) 减少KV缓存和行分块（row-chunking）技术以在单张H100上扩展到百万行；5) 针对时间序列、关系数据、表格-文本数据提供专门检查点或改进集成。
AI.result: 1) TabArena上前向传播显著优于所有调优/集成的基线；2) 在速度/性能Pareto前沿上占优；3) 多类别数据集上排名第一；4) 击败8小时调优的梯度提升树基线（100万行/200特征）；5) TabPFN-3-Plus在TabArena上以200+ Elo（最大子集420 Elo）超过所有非TabPFN模型；6) 比AutoGluon 1.5 extreme快10倍；7) RelBenchV1上关系数据SOTA、TabSTAR上表格-文本SOTA；8) TabPFN-TS-3在fev-bench时间序列基准排名第二；9) SHAP计算快120倍；10) 比TabPFN-2.5快20倍。
AI.conclusion: TabPFN-3通过纯合成数据预训练和系统级优化（测试时计算扩展、KV缓存减少、行分块），在表格数据预测上实现了性能、速度和可扩展性的全面突破，并将SOTA能力拓展到时间序列、关系数据和表格-文本等更广泛领域，同时保持极高的推理效率。

title: ROK-FORTRESS: Measuring the Effect of Geopolitical Transcreation for National Security and Public Safety
comment: 16 pages main body + appendix (63 total), 5 main figures, 4 main tables; dataset at https://huggingface.co/datasets/ScaleAI/ROK-FORTRESS_public
summary:
Safety evaluations for large language models (LLMs) increasingly target high-stakes National Security and Public Safety (NSPS) risks, yet multilingual safety is typically assessed through translation-only benchmarks that preserve the underlying scenario, and empirical evidence of how language and geopolitical context interact remains limited to a narrow set of language pairs. We introduce \emph{ROK-FORTRESS} https://huggingface.co/datasets/ScaleAI/ROK-FORTRESS_public, a bilingual, culturally adversarial NSPS benchmark that uses the English--Korean language pair and U.S.--ROK geopolitical axis as a case study, separating the effects of language and geopolitical grounding via a \emph{transcreation matrix}: adversarial intents are evaluated under controlled combinations of (i) English versus Korean language and (ii) U.S.\ versus Korean entities, institutions, and operational details. Each adversarial prompt is paired with a dual-use benign counterpart to quantify over-refusal. Model responses are then scored using calibrated LLM-as-a-judge panels, applying our expert-crafted, prompt-specific binary rubrics.
  Across a dual-track set of frontier and Korean-optimized models, we find a consistent suppression effect in Korean variants and substantial model-to-model variation in how geopolitical grounding interacts with language. In many models, Korean grounding mitigates the Korean language-driven suppression -- with no model showing significant amplification in the other direction -- indicating that, at least in the English--Korean case, safety behavior is shaped by language-as-risk signals and context interactions that translation-only evaluations miss. The transcreation matrix methodology is designed to generalize to other language--culture pairs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ROK-FORTRESS基准，通过"转创矩阵"（transcreation matrix）分离语言和地缘政治背景对LLM安全评估的影响。在英-韩语言对和美-韩地缘政治轴案例中，发现韩语变体存在一致的安全抑制效应，且地缘政治背景与语言存在交互作用，翻译仅基准会遗漏这些效应。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM多语言安全评估仅通过翻译基准进行，忽略了语言与地缘政治背景的交互作用，且实证证据仅限于少数语言对。作者希望更系统地区分语言和地缘政治背景对安全行为的影响。
AI.method: 构建ROK-FORTRESS双语对抗性NSPS基准，采用"转创矩阵"设计：在2（英语vs韩语）× 2（美国vs韩国实体/机构）四个条件下评估对抗性意图。每个对抗提示配对一个双用途良性提示以量化过度拒绝，并用校准的LLM-as-a-judge专家二元评分标准评估。
AI.result: 前沿模型和韩语优化模型均存在韩语变体的一致安全抑制效应。韩语地缘政治背景（韩国实体）可缓解韩语驱动的安全抑制，且没有模型出现相反方向的显著放大。模型间在地缘政治背景与语言交互上存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 语言本身作为风险信号，与地缘政治背景存在交互作用，这些效应是翻译仅评估所无法捕捉的。转创矩阵方法可推广到其他语言-文化对。

title: PanoPlane: Plane-Aware Panoramic Completion for Sparse-View Indoor 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: We present PanoPlane, an approach for high-fidelity sparse-view indoor novel view synthesis that reconstructs closed room geometry via panoramic scene completion. Unlike perspective-based methods that generate training views from limited fields of view, PanoPlane leverages $360^{\circ}$ panoramic completion to condition the generative process on the full spatial layout. We propose Layout Anchored Attention Steering, a training-free mechanism that steers attention within the diffusion model's internal representation toward scene's detected planar surfaces at inference time. By directing each unobserved region's attention toward geometrically consistent observed content, our method replaces unconstrained hallucination with grounded surface extrapolation. The resulting panoramic completions provide supervision for 3D Gaussian Splatting, enabling accurate novel-view synthesis across unobserved regions from as few as three input views. Experiments on Replica, ScanNet++, and Matterport3D demonstrate state-of-the-art novel view synthesis quality across 3, 6, and 9 input views, achieving up to $+17.8\%$ improvement in PSNR over the current state-of-the-art baseline without any training or fine-tuning of the diffusion model.

AI.tldr: PanoPlane提出了一种基于全景场景补全的稀疏视角室内新视角合成方法，通过Layout Anchored Attention Steering机制引导扩散模型关注检测到的平面表面，无需训练即可从仅3张输入视图实现高质量的新视角合成，在多个数据集上PSNR提升高达17.8%。
AI.motivation: 传统基于视角的方法受限于有限的视场角，无法利用完整的空间布局信息进行新视角合成，导致未观察区域的合成缺乏几何一致性。
AI.method: 提出（1）全景场景补全：利用360°全景图生成完整房间几何；（2）Layout Anchored Attention Steering：一种无需训练的训练时机制，引导扩散模型内部注意力关注检测到的平面表面，将未观察区域的注意力导向几何一致的已观察内容。
AI.result: 在Replica、ScanNet++和Matterport3D数据集上，使用3、6、9张输入视图均达到SOTA，PSNR相比基线提升高达17.8%。
AI.conclusion: PanoPlane通过全景补全和注意力引导，在无需训练或微调扩散模型的情况下，显著提升了稀疏视角下室内新视角合成的质量。

title: Bridging Legal Interpretation and Formal Logic: Faithfulness, Assumption, and the Future of AI Legal Reasoning
comment: 2 pages abstract accepted by Bloomberg LSLLAI 2026 Symposium
summary: The growing adoption of large language models in legal practice brings both significant promise and serious risk. Legal professionals stand to benefit from AI that can reason over contracts, draft documents, and analyze sources at scale, yet the high-stakes nature of legal work demands a level of rigor that current AI systems do not provide. The central problem is not simply that LLMs hallucinate facts and references; it is that they systematically draw inferences that go beyond what the source text actually supports, presenting assumption-laden conclusions as if they were logically grounded. This proposal presents a neuro-symbolic approach to legal AI that combines the expressive power of large language models with the rigor of formal verification, aiming to make AI-assisted legal reasoning both capable and trustworthy, thus reducing the burden of manual verification without sacrificing the accountability that legal practice demands.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种神经符号方法，将大语言模型的表达能力与形式化验证的严谨性相结合，以解决法律AI中LLM超越源文本进行推理的问题，旨在实现既强大又可信的AI辅助法律推理。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在法律实践中存在系统性推理缺陷——不仅会生成幻觉，更会得出超出源文本支持的、充满假设的结论，而法律领域的高风险特性要求更高的严谨性，当前AI系统无法满足这一需求。
AI.method: 采用神经符号方法，结合大语言模型的表达能力与形式化验证的严谨性。
AI.result: 未明确报告具体实验结果，属于研究提案阶段。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有望减少人工验证负担，同时不牺牲法律实践所要求的问责性，使AI辅助法律推理兼具能力与可信度。

title: Neural Fields for NV-Center Inverse Sensing
summary: Inverse problems in scientific sensing are often solved with either hand-designed regularizers or supervised networks trained on simulated labels, yet both can fail when the forward model is nonlinear, spectrally coupled, and physically delicate. We study this issue for noise sensing based on nitrogen-vacancy (NV) centers in diamond, where a quantum sensor measures magnetic-noise spectra generated by sparse spin sources. We show that replacing a common scalar/coherent forward approximation with a tensor power-summed dipolar operator changes the inverse landscape and exposes a center-collapse failure mode in free-density optimization. We propose NeTMY, an amortization-free coordinate neural field coupled to the differentiable NV forward model, with annealed positional encoding, multiscale optimization, sparsity/gating, and spectrum-fidelity losses. Across sparse synthetic reconstructions generated by the corrected operator, NeTMY achieves the best localization and distributional metrics in the tested benchmark. Mechanism experiments show that NeTMY does not directly execute the raw density-space gradient; its parameterization smooths and redistributes updates, mitigating the center-collapse pathology. These results position NV quantum sensing as a useful testbed for physics-faithful neural inverse problems.

AI.tldr: 针对NV量子传感中非线性、频谱耦合且物理敏感的逆问题，提出NeTMY——一种免摊销的坐标神经场模型，结合可微NV前向模型、退火位置编码、多尺度优化、稀疏门控和频谱保真损失，有效解决了中心坍塌病理，在稀疏合成重建中取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 传统的手工正则化器和监督网络在处理非线性、频谱耦合且物理敏感的逆问题时常会失效。研究者希望找到一种物理保真的神经网络方案来解决NV量子传感中的磁噪声谱重建问题。
AI.method: 提出NeTMY模型：免摊销坐标神经场 + 可微NV前向模型 + 退火位置编码 + 多尺度优化 + 稀疏门控机制 + 频谱保真损失函数。用张量幂和偶极算子替代传统标量/相干前向近似。
AI.result: 在稀疏合成重建基准测试中，NeTMY在定位指标和分布指标上均达到最优。机制实验表明NeTMY能平滑并重新分布梯度更新，缓解中心坍塌病理。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将NV量子传感定位为物理保真神经逆问题的有效测试平台。

title: BOOKMARKS: Efficient Active Storyline Memory for Role-playing
summary: Memory systems are critical for role-playing agents (RPAs) to maintain long-horizon consistency. However, existing RPA memory methods (e.g., profiling) mainly rely on recurrent summarization, whose compression inevitably discards important details. To address this issue, we propose a search-based memory framework called BOOKMARKS, which actively initializes, maintains, and updates task-relevant pieces of bookmarks for the current task (e.g., character acting). A bookmark is structured as the answer to a question at a specific point in the storyline. For each current task, BOOKMARKS selects reusable existing bookmarks or initializes new ones (at storyline beginning) with useful questions. These bookmarks are then synchronized to the current story point, with their answers updated accordingly, so they can be efficiently reused in future grounding rounds. Compared with recurrent summarization, BOOKMARKS offers (1) active grounding for capturing task-specific details and (2) passive updating to avoid unnecessary computation. In implementation, BOOKMARKS supports concept, behavior, and state searches, each powered by an efficient synchronization method. BOOKMARKS significantly outperforms RPA memory baselines on 85 characters from 16 artifacts, demonstrating the effectiveness of search-based memory for RPAs.

AI.tldr: 提出基于搜索的记忆框架BOOKMARKS，通过主动初始化、维护和更新与任务相关的书签（结构化为特定故事节点的问答对），替代传统循环式摘要方法，显著提升角色扮演代理的长程一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有RPA记忆方法（如画像法）主要依赖循环式摘要，这种压缩方式不可避免地丢失重要细节，导致长程角色一致性不足。
AI.method: BOOKMARKS：一个搜索式记忆框架。书签结构化为"特定故事节点的问答对"。对于每个当前任务，主动选择可复用的已有书签或初始化新书签（附带有用问题），然后同步到当前故事点并更新答案，以便在未来轮次中高效复用。支持概念、行为和状态三种搜索，每种都有高效的同步方法。
AI.result: 在来自16个文物的85个角色上，BOOKMARKS显著优于所有RPA记忆基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 搜索式记忆比循环式摘要更能保留任务相关细节，主动接地（active grounding）捕捉细节+被动更新（passive updating）避免不必要的计算，这种范式对RPA长程一致性更有效。

title: TeDiO: Temporal Diagonal Optimization for Training-Free Coherent Video Diffusion
comment: CVPR'26 Workshop on Agentic AI for Visual Media
summary: Recent text-to-video diffusion transformers generate visually compelling frames, yet still struggle with temporal coherence, often producing flickering, drifting, or unstable motion. We show that these failures leave a clear imprint inside the model: incoherent videos consistently exhibit irregular, fragmented temporal diagonals in their intermediate self-attention maps, whereas stable motion corresponds to smooth, band-diagonal patterns. Building on this observation, we introduce TeDiO, a training-free, inference-time method that reinforces temporal consistency by regularizing these internal attention patterns. TeDiO estimates diagonal smoothness, identifies unstable regions, and performs lightweight latent updates that promote coherent frame-to-frame dynamics, without modifying model weights or using external motion supervision. Across multiple video diffusion models (e.g., Wan2.1, CogVideoX), TeDiO delivers markedly smoother motion while preserving per-frame visual quality, offering an efficient plug-and-play approach to improving dynamic realism in modern video generation systems.

AI.tldr: TeDiO是一种无需训练、仅在推理时干预的方法，通过正则化自注意力图的对角线模式来提升视频扩散Transformer的时间一致性，有效减少闪烁、漂移等不稳定运动问题。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到视频扩散模型虽能生成视觉上吸引人的帧，但时间一致性差，常出现闪烁、漂移等问题，且缺乏有效的轻量级解决方案。
AI.method: 观察到不稳定视频在中间自注意力图中呈现不规则、碎片化的时间对角线，而稳定运动对应平滑的带状对角线模式。TeDiO通过估计对角线平滑度、识别不稳定区域，并进行轻量级隐空间更新，无需修改模型权重或使用外部运动监督。
AI.result: 在Wan2.1、CogVideoX等多个视频扩散模型上，TeDiO显著提升了运动平滑度，同时保持了每帧的视觉质量。
AI.conclusion: TeDiO是一种高效的即插即用方法，通过内部注意力模式正则化，在不增加训练负担的前提下改善了现代视频生成系统的动态真实感。

title: SPIN: Structural LLM Planning via Iterative Navigation for Industrial Tasks
summary: Industrial LLM agent systems often separate planning from execution, yet LLM planners frequently produce structurally invalid or unnecessarily long workflows, leading to brittle failures and avoidable tool and API cost. We propose \texttt{SPIN}, a planning wrapper that combines validated Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) planning with prefix based execution control. \texttt{SPIN} enforces a strict DAG contract through \texttt{\_validate\_plan\_text} and repair prompting, producing executable plans before downstream execution, and then evaluates DAG prefixes incrementally to stop when the current prefix is sufficient to answer the query. On AssetOpsBench, across 261 scenarios, \texttt{SPIN} reduces executed tasks from 1061 to 623 and improves \emph{Accomplished} from 0.638 to 0.706, while reducing tool calls from 11.81 to 6.82 per run. On MCP Bench, the same wrapper improves planning, grounding, and dependency related scores for both GPT OSS1 and Llama 4 Maverick.

AI.tldr: SPIN是一个结合了有向无环图（DAG）规划验证与前缀执行控制的规划包装器，通过严格验证规划结构、修复无效计划以及增量评估DAG前缀来减少无效执行和工具调用，在多个基准测试上提升了任务完成率并降低了执行成本。
AI.motivation: 工业级LLM智能体系统通常将规划与执行分离，但LLM规划器经常生成结构无效或不必要冗长的工作流，导致脆弱性故障和不必要的工具及API成本，因此需要一种方法来确保规划的结构有效性和执行效率。
AI.method: 提出SPIN规划包装器，核心包含两个机制：(1) 通过_validate_plan_text和修复提示（repair prompting）强制执行严格的DAG契约，确保生成的计划在执行前是结构有效的；(2) 增量评估DAG前缀，在当当前前缀足以回答查询时提前停止执行，避免不必要的后续任务。
AI.result: 在AssetOpsBench的261个场景中，执行任务数从1061降至623，Accomplished得分从0.638提升至0.706，每次运行的调用工具次数从11.81降至6.82。在MCP Bench上，GPT OSS1和Llama 4 Maverick的规划、基础能力和依赖相关分数均有提升。
AI.conclusion: SPIN通过DAG验证和前缀执行控制，有效减少了无效执行和冗余工具调用，提升了LLM智能体系统的任务完成效率和可靠性，且作为插件式包装器具有良好的通用性。

title: HodgeCover: Higher-Order Topological Coverage Drives Compression of Sparse Mixture-of-Experts
summary: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) layers route tokens through a handful of experts, and learning-free compression of these layers reduces inference cost without retraining. A subtle obstruction blocks every existing compressor in this family: three experts can each be pairwise compatible yet form an irreducible cycle when merged together, so any score that ranks experts on pairwise signals is structurally blind to which triples are jointly mergeable. We show the obstruction is a precise mathematical object, the harmonic kernel of the simplicial Laplacian on a 2-complex whose vertices are experts, whose edges carry KL merge barriers, and whose faces carry triplet barriers; Hodge-decomposing the edge-barrier signal isolates the kernel exactly. We turn the diagnostic into a selection objective: HodgeCover greedily covers the harmonic-critical edges and triplet-critical triangles, and a hybrid variant of HodgeCover pairs it with off-the-shelf weight pruning on survivors. On three open-weight Sparse MoE backbones under aggressive expert reduction, HodgeCover matches state-of-the-art learning-free baselines on the expert-reduction axis, leads on the aggressive-compression frontier of the hybrid axis, and uniquely balances retained mass across all four Hodge components. These results show that exposing the harmonic kernel of a learned MoE structure changes which compressor wins at the regime that matters most.

AI.tldr: 本文发现稀疏MoE层中专家合并存在三元不可约环路的根本性障碍，将其形式化为2-复形上的调和核，并提出HodgeCover方法通过覆盖调和关键边和三元关键三角形来实现无训练压缩，在激进压缩场景下表现最优。
AI.motivation: 现有无训练MoE压缩方法基于成对专家兼容性进行合并，但存在结构性盲点：三个专家两两兼容时可能形成不可约环路，导致任何基于成对信号的评分都无法判断三元组是否可合并。作者希望从数学上刻画这一障碍并设计能感知高阶结构的压缩方法。
AI.method: 将专家视为顶点、KL散度障碍视为边、三元组障碍视为面，构建2-复形；利用调和核（simplicial Laplacian的调和核）隔离不可约环路；提出HodgeCover算法，贪心地覆盖调和关键边和三元关键三角形；混合版本与权重剪枝结合。
AI.result: 在三个开源稀疏MoE模型上进行激进专家压缩实验，HodgeCover在专家缩减轴与SOTA基线持平，在混合压缩前沿领先，且独特地实现了所有四个调和分量的保留质量平衡。
AI.conclusion: 揭示MoE结构的调和核能够改变压缩器的胜负格局，特别是在最关键的激进压缩场景下，高阶拓扑感知的方法优于传统成对方法。

title: Why Retrieval-Augmented Generation Fails: A Graph Perspective
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become a powerful and widely used approach for improving large language models by grounding generation in retrieved evidence. However, RAG systems still produce incorrect answers in many cases. Why RAG fails despite having access to external information remains poorly understood. We present a model-internal study of retrieval-augmented generation that examines how retrieved evidence influences answer generation. Using circuit tracing, we construct attribution graphs that model the flow of information through transformer layers during decoding. These graphs represent interactions among retrieved context, intermediate model activations, and generated tokens, providing a graph, circuit-level view of how external evidence is integrated into the model's reasoning process across multiple question answering benchmarks, we observe consistent structural differences: correct predictions exhibit deeper reasoning paths, more distributed evidence flow, and a more structured pattern of local connectivity, while failed predictions show shallower, fragmented, and overly concentrated evidence flow. Building on these findings, we develop a graph-based error detection framework that uses attribution-graph topology features. Furthermore, we show that attribution graphs enable targeted interventions. By reinforcing question-constrained evidence grounding, we reshape internal routing so that answer generation remains guided by the question, leading to more effective integration of retrieved information and fewer errors.

AI.tldr: 本文通过电路追踪构建归因图，研究RAG系统中检索证据如何影响答案生成，发现正确预测与错误预测在推理路径深度、证据流分布和局部连接结构上存在显著差异，并基于此开发了图拓扑特征的错误检测框架和针对性干预方法。
AI.motivation: RAG虽广泛使用但仍会产生错误答案，而"为何RAG在拥有外部信息时仍失败"这一问题尚未被充分理解，亟需从模型内部机制角度揭示原因。
AI.method: 采用电路追踪技术构建归因图，建模检索上下文、中间激活与生成token之间的信息流动；通过比较正确与错误预测的图结构特征，开发基于图拓扑特征的错误检测框架，并提出通过强化问题约束的证据 grounding 进行干预。
AI.result: 正确预测展现出更深的推理路径、更分布式和更结构化的证据流；错误预测则呈现更浅、碎片化且过度集中的证据流。基于此的检测和干预方法有效减少错误。
AI.conclusion: 归因图能够从电路层面解释RAG的失败模式，基于图拓扑特征的错误检测和干预策略能显著提升RAG系统的可靠性。

title: Rethinking the Good Enough Embedding for Easy Few-Shot Learning
summary: The field of deep visual recognition is undergoing a paradigm shift toward universal representations. The Platonic Representation Hypothesis suggests that diverse architectures trained on massive datasets are converging toward a shared, "ideal" latent space. This again raises a critical question: is a "Good Embedding All You Need?" In this paper, we leverage this convergence to demonstrate that off-the-shelf embeddings are inherently "good enough" for complex tasks, rendering intensive task-specific fine-tuning unnecessary. We explore this hypothesis within the few-shot learning framework, proposing a straightforward, non-parametric pipeline that entirely bypasses backpropagation. By utilizing a k-Nearest Neighbor classifier on frozen DINOv2-L features, we conduct a layer-wise characterization to identify an optimal feature extraction. We further demonstrate that manifold refinement via PCA and ICA provides a beneficial regularizing effect. Our results across four major benchmarks demonstrate that our approach consistently surpasses sophisticated meta-learning algorithms, achieving state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用预训练模型（DINOv2-L）的冻结特征，结合k-NN分类器与流形精化（PCA/ICA），无需微调即可在少样本学习中超越复杂的元学习方法。
AI.motivation: 验证"理想嵌入是否就足够了"这一核心问题，探索是否无需针对特定任务进行大量微调，仅靠通用表征就能解决复杂任务。
AI.method: 使用冻结的DINOv2-L特征，逐层分析选择最优特征层，采用k-NN分类器（非参数化、无需反向传播），并通过PCA和ICA进行流形精化作为正则化手段。
AI.result: 在四个主流少样本学习基准上，该方法一致超越了复杂的元学习算法，达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 预训练嵌入本身已足够强大，复杂的任务特定微调并非必要；简单的非参数化方法配合流形精化即可达到甚至超越SOTA。

title: Bad Seeing or Bad Thinking? Rewarding Perception for Vision-Language Reasoning
summary: Achieving robust perception-reasoning synergy is a central goal for advanced Vision-Language Models (VLMs). Recent advancements have pursued this goal via architectural designs or agentic workflows. However, these approaches are often limited by static textual reasoning or complicated by the significant compute and engineering burden of external agentic complexity. Worse, this heavy investment does not yield proportional gains, often witnessing a "seesaw effect" on perception and reasoning. This motivates a fundamental rethinking of the true bottleneck. In this paper, we argue that the root cause of this trade-off is an ambiguity in modality credit assignment: when a VLM fails, is it due to flawed perception ("bad seeing") or flawed logic ("bad thinking")? To resolve this, we introduce a reinforcement learning framework that improves perception-reasoning synergy by reliably rewarding the perception fidelity. We explicitly decompose the generation process into interleaved perception and reasoning steps. This decoupling enables targeted supervision on perception. Crucially, we introduce Perception Verification (PV), leveraging a "blindfolded reasoning" proxy to reward perceptual fidelity independently of reasoning outcomes. Furthermore, to scale training across free-form VL tasks, we propose Structured Verbal Verification, which replaces high-variance LLM judging with structured algorithmic execution. These techniques are integrated into a Modality-Aware Credit Assignment (MoCA) mechanism, which routes rewards to the specific source of error -- either bad seeing or bad thinking -- enabling a single VLM to achieve simultaneous performance gains across a wide task spectrum.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MoCA框架，通过强化学习中的模态感知信用分配机制解决VLM中感知与推理的"跷跷板效应"，利用"蒙眼推理"代理和结构化言语验证分别奖励感知 fidelity，实现单一模型在广泛任务上的同步性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM方法（架构设计或智能体工作流）常受限于静态文本推理或外部智能体复杂性带来的计算与工程负担，且投入产出不成比例，出现感知与推理的"跷跷板效应"。作者认为根本原因是模态信用分配的模糊性——模型失败时无法区分是感知错误（"看不见"）还是推理错误（"想错了"）。
AI.method: 提出MoCA（Modality-Aware Credit Assignment）框架：(1) 将生成过程分解为交错的感知与推理步骤，实现解耦；(2) 引入Perception Verification (PV)，通过"蒙眼推理"（blindfolded reasoning）代理独立奖励感知 fidelity；(3) 提出Structured Verbal Verification，用结构化算法执行替代高方差LLM评判，实现规模化训练；(4) 将上述技术整合为模态感知的信用分配机制，将奖励路由到具体错误来源。
AI.result: 所提方法能使单一VLM在广泛任务谱系上同时获得感知与推理性能的提升，打破了传统方法中两者此消彼长的"跷跷板效应"。
AI.conclusion: 感知与推理之间的权衡根源在于模态信用分配不明确。通过强化学习框架显式解耦感知与推理步骤，并基于模态感知的信用分配机制精准定位错误来源，可以有效打破这一瓶颈，实现VLM感知与推理能力的协同增长。

title: Support Before Frequency in Discrete Diffusion
summary: Discrete diffusion models are increasingly competitive for language modeling, yet it remains unclear how their denoising objectives organize learning. Although these objectives target the full data distribution, we show that the exact reverse process induces a hierarchy between coarse support information and finer frequency information. For uniform and absorbing (a.k.a. masking) diffusion, we prove that, in the small-noise regime of the final denoising steps, each single-token reverse edit decomposes into a leading scale, determined by whether it moves toward the data support (e.g., grammatically valid sentences), and a finer coefficient, determining relative probabilities within the same scale. Thus, recovering validity structure only requires learning the correct order of magnitude of reverse probabilities, whereas recovering data frequencies requires coefficient-level estimation. The separation is mechanism-dependent: uniform diffusion exhibits a trichotomy into validity-improving, validity-preserving, and validity-worsening edits, while absorbing diffusion places its leading-order mass on validity-improving moves. Experiments on a masked language diffusion model and synthetic regular-language tasks support these predictions: support-localization emerges earlier than within-support frequency ranking, and the contrast between uniform and absorbing diffusion matches the predicted rate separation. Together, our results suggest that discrete diffusion models learn data support before data frequencies.

AI.tldr: 本文证明离散扩散模型在去噪过程中会自然产生层次结构：先学习数据支撑（如语法有效性），再学习细粒度频率信息。均匀扩散和吸收扩散在最终去噪步骤中表现出不同的机制分离特性，实验验证了支撑定位早于频率排序的学习顺序。
AI.motivation: 离散扩散模型在语言建模中越来越有竞争力，但其去噪目标如何组织学习过程尚不清楚。作者希望揭示反向过程中的内在学习层次结构。
AI.method: 理论证明在小噪声条件下，单token反向编辑分解为主导尺度（决定是否向数据支撑移动）和精细系数（决定同尺度内的相对概率）；通过均匀扩散和吸收扩散两种机制对比分析；在掩码语言扩散模型和合成正则语言任务上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 支撑定位（有效性识别）先于频率排序出现；均匀扩散呈现三分法（改进/保持/恶化有效性），吸收扩散主导项集中在有效性改进上；两种扩散机制的速率分离与理论预测一致。
AI.conclusion: 离散扩散模型的学习存在层次结构：先学习数据支撑，再学习数据频率。不同扩散机制（均匀vs吸收）导致不同的学习动力学特性。

title: GradShield: Alignment Preserving Finetuning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) pose a significant risk of safety misalignment after finetuning, as models can be compromised by both explicitly and implicitly harmful data. Even some seemingly benign data can inadvertently steer a model towards misaligned behaviors. To address this, we introduce GradShield, a principled filtering method that safeguards LLMs during finetuning by identifying and removing harmful data points before they corrupt the model's alignment. It removes potentially harmful data by computing a Finetuning Implicit Harmfulness Score (FIHS) for each data point and employs an adaptive thresholding algorithm. We apply GradShield to multiple utility fine-tuning tasks across varying levels of harmful data and evaluate the safety and utility performance of the resulting LLMs using various metrics. The results show that GradShield outperforms all baseline methods, consistently maintaining an Attack Success Rate (ASR) below $6\%$ while preserving utility performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GradShield方法，通过计算微调隐式危害分数（FIHS）并采用自适应阈值算法，在微调过程中过滤掉有害数据点，从而保护LLM的安全对齐，将攻击成功率维持在6%以下同时保持模型性能。
AI.motivation: LLMs在微调后面临安全对齐被破坏的重大风险，无论是显式还是隐式的有害数据，甚至某些看似无害的数据都可能无意中引导模型走向不安全行为，因此亟需一种能够主动识别并过滤有害数据的方法。
AI.method: 提出GradShield过滤方法，为每个数据点计算微调隐式危害分数（FIHS），并采用自适应阈值算法识别和移除潜在有害数据，在微调之前进行数据清洗。
AI.result: 在多种实用微调任务和不同水平的有害数据下，GradShield在安全性和实用性上均优于所有基线方法，持续将攻击成功率（ASR）维持在6%以下，同时保持模型效用性能不受影响。
AI.conclusion: GradShield是一种有效的、有原则的数据过滤方法，能够在微调阶段主动保护LLM的安全对齐，在不牺牲实用性能的前提下有效抵御有害数据带来的安全风险。

title: You Only Landmark Once: Lightweight U-Net Face Super Resolution with YOLO-World Landmark Heatmaps
summary: Face image super-resolution aims to recover high-resolution facial images from severely degraded inputs. Under extreme upscaling factors, fine facial details are often lost, making accurate reconstruction challenging. Existing methods typically rely on heavy network architectures, adversarial training schemes, or separate alignment networks, increasing model complexity and computational cost. To address these issues, we propose a lightweight U-Net based-architecture designed to reconstructs $128{ \times }128$ facial images from severely degraded $16{ \times }16$ inputs, achieving an $8 \times $ magnification. A key contribution is a novel auxiliary-training-free supervision strategy that leverages heatmaps generated by YOLO-World, an open-vocabulary object detector, to localize key facial features such as eyes, nose, and mouth. These heatmaps are converted into spatial weights to form a heatmap-guided loss that emphasizes reconstruction errors in semantically important regions. Unlike prior methods that require dedicated landmark or alignment networks, our approach directly reuses detector outputs as supervision, maintaining an efficient training and inference pipeline. Experiments on the aligned CelebA dataset demonstrate that the proposed loss consistently improves quantitative metrics and produces sharper, more realistic reconstructions. Overall, our results show that lightweight networks can effectively exploit detection-driven priors for perceptually convincing extreme upscaling, without adversarial training or increased computational cost.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级U-Net架构，利用YOLO-World检测器生成的热图作为空间权重引导损失函数，在不增加额外训练成本的情况下，实现从16×16到128×128的8倍人脸图像超分辨率重建。
AI.motivation: 现有面部超分辨率方法依赖重型网络架构、对抗训练或额外的对齐网络，导致模型复杂度和计算成本过高，亟需一种轻量级且高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用轻量级U-Net架构，利用YOLO-World开放词汇目标检测器生成面部关键特征（眼睛、鼻子、嘴）的热图，将其转换为空间权重，构建热图引导损失函数，在语义重要区域增强重建误差惩罚，无需额外的训练或对齐网络。
AI.result: 在CelebA数据集上，所提损失函数在定量指标上持续提升，并生成更清晰、更逼真的重建图像，在8倍极端放大下实现了有竞争力的超分辨率效果。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级网络可以有效利用检测驱动的先验知识实现感知上令人信服的极端放大，无需对抗训练或增加计算成本，验证了检测器输出作为监督信号的有效性。

title: MathAtlas: A Benchmark for Autoformalization in the Wild
summary: Current autoformalization benchmarks are largely focused on olympiad or undergraduate mathematics, while graduate and research-level mathematics remains underexplored. In this paper, we introduce MathAtlas, the first large-scale autoformalization benchmark of in the wild graduate-level mathematics, containing ~52k theorems, definitions, exercises, examples, and proofs extracted from 103 graduate mathematics textbooks. MathAtlas is enriched with a mathematical dependency graph containing ~178k relations, and is the first autoformalization benchmark to include such relations, facilitating evaluation and development of dependency-aware autoformalization systems. Our extensive experiments show that MathAtlas is high quality but extremely challenging: strong baselines achieve at most 9.8% correctness on theorem statements and 16.7% on definitions. Furthermore, we find performance of state-of-the-art models degrades substantially with dependency depth: on MA-Hard, a subset of 700 entities with the deepest dependency trees, the best model achieves only 2.6% correctness for autoformalization on this challenging dataset. We release MathAtlas to the community as a benchmark set for large-scale autoformalization of graduate-level mathematics in the wild.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MathAtlas，首个大规模研究生级别数学的自动形式化基准，包含约5.2万个定理/定义/习题/证明（来自103本研究生教材），以及约17.8万条数学依赖关系。实验表明该基准极具挑战性，最强模型在定理语句上仅达到9.8%的正确率。
AI.motivation: 现有自动形式化基准主要聚焦于奥林匹克或本科数学，而研究生及科研级别的数学尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 从103本研究生数学教科书中提取约5.2万个数学实体（定理、定义、习题、例子、证明），并构建包含约17.8万条关系的数学依赖图，首次在自动形式化基准中引入依赖关系。
AI.result: 最强基线模型在定理语句上仅达9.8%的正确率，定义上达16.7%；在依赖深度最大的MA-Hard子集（700个实体）上，最佳模型正确率仅2.6%。
AI.conclusion: MathAtlas是一个高质量但极具挑战性的基准，揭示了现有模型在深度依赖场景下的严重性能退化，为依赖感知的自动形式化系统提供了新的评估标准。

title: Dywave: Event-Aligned Dynamic Tokenization for Heterogeneous IoT Sensing Signal
summary: Internet of Things (IoT) systems continuously collect heterogeneous sensing signals from ubiquitous sensors to support intelligent applications such as human activity analysis, emotion monitoring, and environmental perception. These signals are inherently non-stationary and multi-scale, posing unique challenges for standard tokenization techniques. This paper proposes Dywave, a dynamic tokenization framework for IoT sensing signals that constructs compact input representations aligned with intrinsic temporal structures and underlying physical events. Dywave leverages wavelet-based hierarchical decomposition, identifies meaningful temporal boundaries corresponding to underlying semantic events, and adaptively compresses redundant intervals while preserving temporal coherence. Extensive evaluations on five real-world IoT sensing datasets across activity recognition, stress assessment, and nearby object detection demonstrate that Dywave outperforms state-of-the-art methods by up to 12% in accuracy, while improving computational efficiency by reducing input token lengths by up to 75% across mainstream sequence models. Moreover, Dywave exhibits improved robustness to domain shifts and varying sequence lengths.

AI.tldr: 提出Dywave动态分词框架，利用小波层次分解对IoT传感信号进行结构化压缩，在保持时序一致性的同时减少75%的输入token长度，在五个真实数据集上准确率提升高达12%。
AI.motivation: IoT传感信号具有非平稳、多尺度的特性，标准分词技术难以有效处理这类信号的时序结构和物理事件边界，导致输入表示冗余且效率低下。
AI.method: 基于小波层次分解，识别与底层语义事件对应的有意义的时序边界，自适应压缩冗余区间，同时保持时序连贯性，构建与内在时间结构和物理事件对齐的紧凑输入表示。
