This paper examines the inferential step from "training is expensive" to "neural solvers are net-inefficient", which is where the critique actually goes wrong. Training the network costs a large fixed amount of GPU energy; running the metaheuristic costs a small amount of CPU energy on every instance, repeated as long as the solver is deployed. The two are not commensurable until a deployment volume is fixed. We define the Amortized Efficiency Threshold (AET) as the deployment volume above which a neural solver breaks even with a heuristic baseline in total energy or carbon, under an explicit constraint on solution quality. We show that the cumulative-energy ratio between the two solvers tends to a constant strictly below one whenever the network wins per-instance, and that this limit does not depend on how the training cost was measured. An embodied-carbon term amortizes hardware fabrication symmetrically on both sides. We instantiate the framework on the Multi-Task VRP (MTVRP) environment at n=20 customers across 19 problem variants and five training seeds, with HGS via PyVRP as the heuristic baseline. The measured crossover sits near $1.58 \times 10^5$ deployed instances; the per-instance ratio is 0.41, reflecting the moderate size of the instances tested. The contribution is the framework, the open instrumentation, and the measurement protocol; structural convergence of the ratio at larger problem sizes is left to future empirical work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出摊销效率阈值（AET）框架，论证神经求解器在超过一定部署量后，其总能耗/碳排放可与传统启发式方法持平甚至更优，并以MTVRP环境实验验证了交叉点约在158k实例处。
AI.motivation: 反驳"神经组合优化求解器因GPU训练能耗高而净效率低于CPU元启发式"这一常见批评，指出训练是固定成本，推理是可变成本，两者需在特定部署量下才可比较。
AI.method: 提出AET框架（摊销效率阈值），定义神经求解器在给定解质量约束下与启发式基线总能耗/碳排持平的部署量；推导了当神经求解器每实例胜出时累积能耗比趋于小于1的常数，且该极限与训练成本测量方式无关。
AI.result: 在MTVRP环境（n=20，19个变体，5个种子）中，以HGS/PyVRP为基线，测得交叉点约1.58×10⁵实例，每实例能耗比0.41。
AI.conclusion: 贡献在于分析框架、开源工具和测量协议；更大规模问题的结构收敛性留待未来研究。

title: Proposal and study of statistical features for string similarity computation and classification
summary: Adaptations of features commonly applied in the field of visual computing, co-occurrence matrix (COM) and run-length matrix (RLM), are proposed for the similarity computation of strings in general (words, phrases, codes and texts). The proposed features are not sensitive to language related information. These are purely statistical and can be used in any context with any language or grammatical structure. Other statistical measures that are commonly employed in the field such as longest common subsequence, maximal consecutive longest common subsequence, mutual information and edit distances are evaluated and compared. In the first synthetic set of experiments, the COM and RLM features outperform the remaining state-of-the-art statistical features. In 3 out of 4 cases, the RLM and COM features were statistically more significant than the second best group based on distances (P-value < 0.001). When it comes to a real text plagiarism dataset, the RLM features obtained the best results.

AI.tldr: 提出将视觉计算中的共现矩阵（COM）和游程矩阵（RLM）改编为通用字符串（单词、短语、代码、文本）的相似度计算方法，实验证明在合成数据集和真实抄袭检测数据集上均优于现有统计方法。
AI.motivation: 现有字符串相似度方法（如编辑距离、最长公共子序列等）对语言结构敏感，缺乏跨语言、跨语法的通用统计方法。作者希望将视觉领域的成熟特征引入文本分析，实现与语言无关的纯统计相似度计算。
AI.method: 将视觉计算中的共现矩阵（COM）和游程矩阵（RLM）特征改编为通用字符串相似度特征；与最长公共子序列、最大连续最长公共子序列、互信息、编辑距离等统计方法进行对比实验。
AI.result: 在合成实验中，COM和RLM特征优于其他统计特征；4组实验中有3组RLM和COM的统计显著性优于基于距离的第二佳方法组（P<0.001）；在真实文本抄袭数据集上，RLM特征取得最佳结果。
AI.conclusion: COM和RLM作为纯统计、与语言无关的特征，在字符串相似度计算中具有显著优势，尤其适用于跨语言和无需语法信息的场景。

title: Editor's Choice: Evaluating Abstract Intent in Image Editing through Atomic Entity Analysis
summary: Humans naturally communicate through abstract concepts like "mood". However, current image editing benchmarks focus primarily on explicit, literal commands, leaving abstract instructions largely underexplored. In this work, we first formalize the definition and taxonomy of abstract image editing. To measure instruction-following in this challenging domain, we introduce Entity-Rubrics, a framework that breaks down abstract edits into individual, entity-level assessments and achieves strong correlation with human judgment. Alongside this framework, we contribute AbstractEdit, the first benchmark dedicated to abstract image editing across diverse real-world scenes. Evaluating 11 leading models on this dataset reveals a fundamental challenge: standard architectures struggle to balance intent and preservation, commonly defaulting to under-editing or over-editing. Our analysis demonstrates that driving meaningful improvements relies heavily on integrating advanced LLM text encoders and iterative thinking. Looking forward, our entity-based paradigm can generalize beyond assessment to serve as a reward model, enable models to correctly interpret abstract communication, or highlight specific failures in test-time critique loops. Ultimately, we hope this work serves as a stepping stone toward seamless multimodal interaction, closing the gap between rigid machine execution and the natural, open-ended way humans communicate.

AI.tldr: 本文提出抽象图像编辑的定义与分类，构建Entity-Rubrics评估框架和AbstractEdit基准数据集，发现现有模型在意图保持与内容保留间的平衡存在困难，并指出集成高级LLM文本编码器和迭代推理是提升性能的关键。
AI.motivation: 现有图像编辑基准主要关注显式、字面指令，缺乏对抽象概念（如"情绪"）指令的评估，而人类自然交流中充满抽象表达。
AI.method: 1) 形式化定义抽象图像编辑及其分类体系；2) 提出Entity-Rubrics评估框架，将抽象编辑拆解为实体级评估；3) 构建AbstractEdit基准数据集。
AI.result: 对11个主流模型评估发现，标准架构难以平衡意图保持与内容保留，倾向于欠编辑或过编辑；集成高级LLM文本编码器和迭代推理能显著改善性能。
AI.conclusion: 基于实体的评估范式可泛化为奖励模型、帮助模型理解抽象交流或在测试时纠错，为缩小机器执行与人类自然沟通的差距迈出重要一步。

title: Action-Inspired Generative Models
summary: We introduce Action-Inspired Generative Models (AGMs), a dual-network generative framework motivated by the observation that existing bridge-matching methods assign uniform regression weight to every stochastic transition in the transport landscape, regardless of whether a given bridge sample lies along a structurally coherent trajectory or a degenerate one. We address this by introducing a lightweight learned scalar potential $V_φ$ that scores bridge samples online and modulates the drift objective via importance weights derived through a stop-gradient barrier -- preventing adversarial feedback between the two networks whilst preserving $V_φ$'s guiding signal. Crucially, $V_φ$ comprises only $\sim$1.4% of the primary drift network's parameter count, adds no overhead to the inference graph, and requires no iterative half-bridge fitting or auxiliary stochastic differential equation (SDE) solvers: it is a plug-and-play enhancement to any bridge-matching training loop. At inference, $V_φ$ is discarded entirely, leaving standard Euler-Maruyama integration of the exponential moving average (EMA) drift. We demonstrate that selectively penalising uninformative transport paths through the learned potential yields consistent improvements in generation quality across fidelity and coverage metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Action-Inspired Generative Models (AGMs)，一个双网络生成框架，通过轻量级可学习的标量势Vφ在线评分桥梁样本并调制漂移目标，选择性地惩罚无信息传输路径，在不增加推理开销的情况下提升生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有桥匹配方法对所有随机过渡赋予均匀回归权重，无论样本处于结构连贯轨迹还是退化轨迹，导致生成质量受限。
AI.method: 引入轻量级可学习标量势Vφ（仅占主网络参数量的1.4%），在线评分桥梁样本，通过stop-gradient机制导出重要性权重来调制漂移目标，避免两个网络间的对抗反馈。
AI.result: 通过选择性惩罚无信息传输路径，在保真度和覆盖度指标上均获得一致的生成质量提升。
AI.conclusion: Vφ作为即插即用增强模块，推理时完全丢弃，不增加任何推理开销，可无缝集成到任何桥匹配训练流程中。

title: MemEye: A Visual-Centric Evaluation Framework for Multimodal Agent Memory
summary: Long-term agent memory is increasingly multimodal, yet existing evaluations rarely test whether agents preserve the visual evidence needed for later reasoning. In prior work, many visually grounded questions can be answered using only captions or textual traces, allowing answers to be inferred without preserving the fine-grained visual evidence. Meanwhile, harder cases that require reasoning over changing visual states are largely absent. Therefore, we introduce MemEye, a framework that evaluates memory capabilities from two dimensions: one measures the granularity of decisive visual evidence (from scene-level to pixel-level evidence), and the other measures how retrieved evidence must be used (from single evidence to evolutionary synthesis). Under this framework, we construct a new benchmark across 8 life-scenario tasks, with ablation-driven validation gates for assessing answerability, shortcut resistance, visual necessity, and reasoning structure. By evaluating 13 memory methods across 4 VLM backbones, we show that current architectures still struggle to preserve fine-grained visual details and reason about state changes over time. Our findings show that long-term multimodal memory depends on evidence routing, temporal tracking, and detail extraction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MemEye框架，从视觉证据粒度和推理方式两个维度评估多模态长期记忆，构建了8个生活场景的基准测试，发现现有方法难以保留细粒度视觉细节和推理状态变化。
AI.motivation: 现有评估很少检验智能体是否保留后期推理所需的视觉证据，许多视觉问题仅靠文字线索就能回答，且缺乏对变化视觉状态的推理评估。
AI.method: 提出MemEye框架，包含两个评估维度：视觉证据粒度（场景级到像素级）和证据使用方式（单一证据到演化综合），构建8个生活场景基准，并设计消融驱动的验证门控机制。
AI.result: 评估13种记忆方法和4种VLM骨干，发现现有架构难以保留细粒度视觉细节，也无法有效推理状态随时间的变化。
AI.conclusion: 长期多模态记忆依赖于证据路由、时序追踪和细节提取三个关键能力。

title: MechVerse: Evaluating Physical Motion Consistency in Video Generation Models
summary: Text- and image-conditioned video generation models have achieved strong visual fidelity and temporal coherence, but they often fail to generate motion governed by kinematic and geometric constraints. In these settings, object parts must remain rigid, maintain contact or coupling with neighboring components, and transfer motion consistently across connected parts. These requirements are especially explicit in articulated mechanical assemblies, where motion is constrained by rigid-link geometry, contact/coupling relations, and transmission through kinematic chains. A generated video may therefore appear plausible while violating the intended mechanism, such as rotating a part that should translate, deforming a rigid component, breaking coupling between parts, or failing to move downstream components. To evaluate this gap, We introduce MechVerse, a benchmark for mechanically consistent image-to-video generation. MechVerse contains 21,156 synthetic clips from 1,357 mechanical assemblies across 141 categories, organized into three tiers of increasing kinematic complexity: independent articulation, pairwise coupling, and densely coupled multi-part mechanisms. Each clip is paired with a structured prompt describing part identities, stationary supports, moving components, motion primitives, direction, speed/extent, and inter-part dependencies. We evaluate proprietary, open-source, and fine-tuned image-to-video models using standard video metrics, instruction-following scores, and human judgments of motion correctness and kinematic coupling. Results show that current models can preserve appearance and smoothness while failing to generate mechanically admissible motion, with errors increasing as coupling complexity grows. MechVerse provides a benchmark for measuring and improving mechanism-aware video generation from image and language inputs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MechVerse基准，用于评估图像到视频生成模型在机械运动一致性方面的表现，包含21,156个合成视频片段，涵盖三类运动复杂度，结果显示现有模型在视觉保真度上表现良好，但在机械约束运动生成方面存在显著缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有文本/图像条件视频生成模型在视觉质量和时间连贯性上表现优异，但常违反运动学与几何约束（如刚性、接触、耦合关系），尤其在关节机械装配体中运动受刚性连杆几何、接触/耦合关系及运动链传动约束，生成的视频看似合理却存在运动错误（如旋转部件应平移、刚性部件变形、耦合中断等），因此需要系统评估这一差距。
AI.method: 构建MechVerse基准，包含1,357个机械装配体的21,156个合成视频片段，覆盖141个类别，按运动复杂度分为三个层级：独立关节运动、成对耦合运动、密集耦合多部件运动。每个片段配有结构化提示描述部件标识、固定支撑、运动部件、运动模式、方向、速度/幅度及部件间依赖关系。采用标准视频指标、指令遵循评分及人工判断评估运动正确性与运动学耦合。
AI.result: 现有模型在保持外观和平滑性方面表现良好，但无法生成机械上可接受的运动；随着耦合复杂度增加，运动错误显著增多。
AI.conclusion: MechVerse为从图像和语言输入中评估和改进具备机构感知能力的视频生成提供了基准，指出了当前模型在机械约束运动生成方面的关键短板。

title: Dual-Dimensional Consistency: Balancing Budget and Quality in Adaptive Inference-Time Scaling
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable abilities in reasoning. However, maximizing their potential through inference-time scaling faces challenges in trade-off between sampling budget and reasoning quality. Current strategies remain inefficient as they typically treat sampling width and depth as orthogonal objectives, where width consensus methods risk reinforcing hallucinations, while depth pruning mechanisms prematurely truncate complex yet valid reasoning chains. Therefore, we propose Dual-Dimensional Consistency (DDC), a unified framework that bridges path quality with adaptive termination. By coupling Confidence-Weighted Bayesian protocol with a Trend-Aware Stratified Pruning, our method ensures that computational resources are concentrated on high quality reasoning paths, filtering hallucinations while accelerating consensus. Evaluations across five benchmarks demonstrate that this approach reduces token consumption by over 10 times while maintaining or exceeding the accuracy of strong baselines across various LLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出双维一致性（DDC）框架，通过置信度加权贝叶斯协议与趋势感知分层剪枝，在推理时实现采样宽度与深度的统一优化，在保持或提升准确率的同时将token消耗降低10倍以上。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM推理时扩展策略在采样预算与推理质量之间存在权衡困境：宽度共识方法易强化幻觉，深度剪枝机制会过早截断复杂但有效的推理链。二者被视为正交目标，缺乏统一框架。
AI.method: 提出双维一致性（DDC）框架，包含两个核心组件：1）置信度加权贝叶斯协议（Confidence-Weighted Bayesian protocol），用于评估路径质量；2）趋势感知分层剪枝（Trend-Aware Stratified Pruning），实现自适应终止决策。两者协同将计算资源聚焦于高质量推理路径。
AI.result: 在五个基准测试上，DDC方法将token消耗降低10倍以上，同时保持或超越强基线的准确率，且适用于多种LLM。
AI.conclusion: DDC统一了采样宽度与深度的优化目标，有效平衡了推理效率与质量，为LLM推理时扩展提供了一种更高效的范式。

title: DRL-STAF: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Framework for State-Aware Forecasting of Complex Multivariate Hidden Markov Processes
summary: Forecasting multivariate hidden Markov processes is challenging due to nonlinear and nonstationary observations, latent state transitions, and cross-sequence dependencies. While deep learning methods achieve strong predictive accuracy, they typically lack explicit state modeling, whereas Hidden Markov Models (HMMs) provide interpretable latent states but struggle with complex nonlinear emissions and scalability. To address these limitations, we propose DRL-STAF, a Deep Reinforcement Learning based STate-Aware Forecasting framework that jointly predicts next-step observations and estimates the corresponding hidden states for complex multivariate hidden Markov processes. Specifically, DRL-STAF models complex nonlinear emissions using deep neural networks and estimates discrete hidden states using reinforcement learning, reducing the reliance on predefined transition structures and enabling flexible adaptation to diverse temporal dynamics. In particular, DRL-STAF mitigates the state-space explosion encountered by typical multivariate HMM-based methods. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DRL-STAF outperforms HMM variants, standalone deep learning models, and existing DL-HMM hybrids in most cases, while also providing reliable hidden-state estimates.

AI.tldr: 提出DRL-STAF框架，融合深度强化学习与隐马尔可夫模型，用于多元隐马尔可夫过程的预测与隐状态估计，在多项实验中表现优于HMM变体、纯深度学习模型及现有混合模型。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法预测精度高但缺乏显式状态建模，HMM可解释但难以处理非线性发射和扩展性问题，亟需一种既能建模非线性又能提供可解释隐状态且可扩展的混合方法。
AI.method: DRL-STAF框架：用深度神经网络建模复杂非线性发射，用强化学习估计离散隐状态，减少对预定义转移结构的依赖，缓解多元HMM的状态空间爆炸问题。
AI.result: 在大部分实验场景下，DRL-STAF优于HMM变体、纯深度学习模型以及现有DL-HMM混合模型，同时能提供可靠的隐状态估计。
AI.conclusion: 深度强化学习与HMM的融合是一种有效的范式，能够在保持预测精度的同时提供可解释的隐状态推断，并缓解传统HMM的扩展性瓶颈。

title: Forgetting That Sticks: Quantization-Permanent Unlearning via Circuit Attribution
summary: Standard unlearning evaluations measure behavioral suppression in full precision, immediately after training, despite every deployed language model being quantized first. Recent work has shown that 4-bit post-training quantization can reverse machine unlearning; we show this is not a tuning artefact but a systematic dual failure: gradient-based methods that achieve meaningful forgetting lose it under compression, while methods that survive quantization barely change the model. Both failures trace to the same root cause: across all baselines, per-parameter updates lie 47-828x below the NF4 quantization bin width; updates diffused across billions of parameters cannot clear quantization bin boundaries, a consequence we formalize as a sparsity-permanence tradeoff. We present MANSU (Mechanistic-Aligned Null-Space Unlearning), which resolves both modes by combining causal circuit attribution to isolate the minimal forget-set subgraph, circuit-restricted null-space projection with a diagonal-Fisher retain bound, and a per-parameter magnitude floor guaranteeing quantization survival by construction. We additionally introduce Circuit Attribution Divergence (CAD), a mechanistic verification metric distinguishing structural erasure from behavioral suppression, a distinction existing metrics cannot make. Across multiple model families and hazard benchmarks, MANSU is the first method to jointly satisfy all four properties with margin on each (meaningful forgetting, retain preservation, non-positive PTQ gap, and structural erasure), while gradient-based baselines recover up to +0.05 accuracy under compression.

AI.tldr: 该论文发现量化（4-bit）会逆转大模型的安全遗忘（unlearning），提出了一种名为MANSU的新方法，通过因果电路归因、零空间投影和参数幅度阈值，在压缩后仍能保持遗忘效果，并引入了电路归因散度（CAD）作为新的机制验证指标。
AI.motivation: 现有的遗忘评估仅在未压缩的全精度模型上进行，但实际部署的语言模型都会先被量化。近期研究显示4-bit量化可以逆转遗忘效果，本文旨在揭示这一现象的根本原因并提出解决方案。
AI.method: 首先形式化定义了稀疏性-持久性权衡（sparsity-permanence tradeoff），指出梯度方法导致的参数更新远低于量化bin宽度（47-828倍）。提出MANSU方法，包括：1）因果电路归因筛选最小遗忘子图；2）电路受限的零空间投影结合对角Fisher保留约束；3）参数幅度下限保证量化后存活。同时提出电路归因散度（CAD）作为结构性擦除的验证指标。
AI.result: MANSU是首个在所有四个评估维度（有效遗忘、保留保持、非正PTQ差距、结构性擦除）上均有裕度的方法，而基于梯度的基线方法在压缩后恢复最多+0.05的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 量化后遗忘失效是系统性的双重失败：梯度方法能实现遗忘但无法抵抗压缩，能抵抗压缩的方法几乎不改变模型。MANSU通过机制对齐的设计从根本上解决了这一矛盾。

title: Exploring Vision-Language Models for Online Signature Verification: A Zero-Shot Capability Study
comment: Accepted at the 14th International Workshop on Biometrics and Forensics
summary: Recent advancements in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in general visual reasoning, yet their applicability to rigorous biometric tasks remains unexplored. This work presents an exploratory study evaluating the zero-shot performance of state-of-the-art VLMs (GPT-5.2 and Gemini 2.5 Pro) on the Signature Verification Challenge (SVC) benchmark. To enable visual processing, raw kinematic time-series are converted into static images, encoding pressure information into stroke opacity whenever available in the source data. Furthermore, we introduce a scoring protocol that extracts latent token probabilities to compute robust biometric scores. Experimental results reveal a significant performance dichotomy dependent on signal quality and forgery type. In random forgery scenarios, the zero-shot VLM achieves exceptional discrimination, with GPT-5.2 reaching an Equal Error Rate of 0.32% in mobile tasks, outperforming supervised state-of-the-art systems. Conversely, in skilled forgery scenarios, where the task is more challenging because both signatures are almost identical, the results are significantly worse, and a critical "Rationalization Trap" emerges: chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning degrades performance as the model produces kinematic hallucinations to justify forgery artifacts as natural variability.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了视觉语言模型（GPT-5.2和Gemini 2.5 Pro）在签名验证任务上的零样本能力，将时序信号转为静态图像并引入概率评分协议。结果显示：随机伪造场景下性能优异（EER低至0.32%），但在熟练伪造场景下表现显著下降，链式思维推理反而会因"合理化陷阱"导致性能退化。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉语言模型在通用视觉推理上表现出色，但其在严格的生物特征识别任务（如签名验证）中的适用性尚未被探索。作者希望填补这一空白，评估VLM是否能够胜任这种需要精细判别能力的任务。
AI.method: 1）将原始运动时序信号转换为静态图像，利用笔画透明度编码压力信息；2）设计基于潜在token概率的评分协议，提取鲁棒的生物特征分数；3）在SVC基准上对GPT-5.2和Gemini 2.5 Pro进行零样本评估，区分随机伪造和熟练伪造场景。
AI.result: 随机伪造场景下，零样本VLM表现优异（GPT-5.2在移动端任务EER=0.32%，超越监督方法）；熟练伪造场景下性能显著下降；发现"合理化陷阱"：链式思维推理会使模型产生运动幻觉，将伪造痕迹归因为自然变异。
AI.conclusion: VLM在生物特征任务中展现出潜力，但受限于伪造类型和信号质量。链式思维推理在需要精细判别时反而有害，提示需要设计更适合生物特征任务的推理策略。

title: Why Neighborhoods Matter: Traversal Context and Provenance in Agentic GraphRAG
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures, Submitted at IJCAI-ECAI 2026 Joint Workshop on GENAIK and NORA
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation can improve factuality by grounding answers in external evidence, but Agentic GraphRAG complicates what it means for citations to be faithful. In these systems, an agent explores a knowledge graph before producing an answer and a small set of citations. We frame citation faithfulness as a trajectory-level problem: final citations should not only support the answer, but also account for the graph traversal, structure, and visited-but-uncited entities that may influence it. Through controlled ablation experiments, we compare the effects of isolating, removing, and masking cited and uncited graph entities. Our results show that cited evidence is often necessary, as removing it substantially changes answers and reduces accuracy. However, citations are not sufficient, because accurate answers can also depend on uncited traversal context and surrounding graph structure. These findings suggest that citation evaluation in Agentic GraphRAG should move beyond source support toward provenance over the broader retrieval trajectory.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Agentic GraphRAG系统中的引文忠实性问题，发现虽然引用的证据通常是必要的（移除会显著降低答案质量），但仅靠引用并不充分，因为未引用的图遍历上下文和结构也会影响答案。因此，引文评估应扩展到整个检索轨迹，而不仅仅是来源支持。
AI.motivation: 在Agentic GraphRAG系统中，智能体在知识图谱中探索后才生成答案和少量引文，传统的引文忠实性评估（仅关注引文是否支持答案）已不足以衡量系统的可信度，因为未引用的图遍历节点和结构可能同样影响答案。
AI.method: 通过受控消融实验，分别对引用和未引用的图实体进行隔离、移除和遮蔽处理，观察这些操作对答案质量和准确性的影响。
AI.result: 1) 引用的证据通常是必要的——移除它们会显著改变答案并降低准确性；2) 但引用并不充分——准确的答案也可能依赖于未引用的遍历上下文和周围的图结构。
AI.conclusion: Agentic GraphRAG的引文评估应从单纯的"来源支持"转向对更广泛检索轨迹的溯源评估。

title: Unbiased and Second-Order-Free Training for High-Dimensional PDEs
summary: Deep learning methods based on backward stochastic differential equations (BSDEs) have emerged as competitive alternatives to physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) for solving high-dimensional partial differential equations (PDEs). By leveraging probabilistic representations, BSDE approaches can avoid the curse of dimensionality and often admit second-order-free training objectives that do not require explicit Hessian evaluations. It has recently been established that the commonly used Euler-Maruyama (EM) time discretization induces an intrinsic bias in BSDE training losses. While high-order schemes such as Heun can fully eliminate this bias, such schemes re-introduce second-order spatial derivatives and incur substantial computational overhead. In this work, we provide a principled analysis of EM-induced loss bias and propose an unbiased, second-order-free training framework that preserves the computational advantages of BSDE methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/seojaemin22/Un-EM-BSDE.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了BSDE方法中Euler-Maruyama时间离散化带来的损失偏差，并提出了一种无偏的、免二阶导数的训练框架，在保持计算优势的同时消除偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有BSDE方法中Euler-Maruyama时间离散化会引入固有偏差，而高阶格式（如Heun）虽能消除偏差但需计算二阶空间导数，计算开销大。作者希望在不引入二阶导数的情况下消除偏差。
AI.method: 对EM时间离散化导致的损失偏差进行理论分析，提出一种无偏的、免二阶导数的训练框架，代码已开源。
AI.result: 提出的无偏框架能够消除EM离散化带来的偏差，同时保持BSDE方法无需二阶导数的计算优势。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了一种兼顾精度与计算效率的BSDE训练方案，在解决高维PDE问题上具有实用价值。

title: Self-Distilled Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a central paradigm for post-training LLM agents, yet its trajectory-level reward signal provides only coarse supervision for long-horizon interaction. On-Policy Self-Distillation (OPSD) complements RL by introducing dense token-level guidance from a teacher branch augmented with privileged context. However, transferring OPSD to multi-turn agents proves problematic: compounding multi-turn instability destabilizes supervision, while skill-conditioned privileged guidance requires asymmetric treatment for negative teacher rejections may arise from imperfect skills retrieval or utilization. We introduce SDAR (Self-Distilled Agentic Reinforcement Learning), which treats OPSD as a gated auxiliary objective while keeping RL as the primary optimization backbone. SDAR maps detached token-level signals into a sigmoid gate, strengthening distillation on teacher-endorsed positive-gap tokens and softly attenuating negative teacher rejections. Across the Qwen2.5 and Qwen3 families on ALFWorld, WebShop, and Search-QA, SDAR substantially improves over GRPO (+9.4% on ALFWorld, +7.0% on Search-QA, +10.2% on WebShop-Acc), avoids the instability of naive GRPO+OPSD, and consistently outperforms hybrid RL--OPSD baselines across model scales.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SDAR方法，通过门控机制将OPSD的密集token级信号作为辅助目标，以强化学习为主优化范式，解决了多轮智能体中OPSD的不稳定性和特权指导的负面拒绝问题，在多个基准上显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: RL在LLM智能体后训练中仅提供粗粒度的轨迹级奖励信号；OPSD虽引入密集的token级教师指导，但在多轮交互场景中面临复合不稳定性和技能条件特权指导的负面拒绝问题。
AI.method: 将OPSD视为门控辅助目标，通过sigmoid门控机制对解耦的token级信号进行处理：强化教师认可的正面差距token，软性衰减教师拒绝的负面信号，保持RL作为主优化目标。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5和Qwen3系列上，ALFWorld提升+9.4%，Search-QA提升+7.0%，WebShop-Acc提升+10.2%，避免GRPO+OPSD的不稳定性，且在不同模型规模上一致优于混合RL-OPSD基线。
AI.conclusion: SDAR有效解决了OPSD在多轮智能体中的迁移问题，通过门控辅助目标策略实现了RL与密集信号指导的互补，显著提升了多轮RL智能体的性能。

title: SR-Prominence: A Crowdsourced Protocol and Dataset Suite for Perceptually-Weighted Super-Resolution Artifact Evaluation
summary: Modern image super-resolution methods generate detailed, visually appealing results, but they often introduce visual artifacts: unnatural patterns and texture distortions that degrade perceived quality. These defects vary widely in perceptual impact--some are barely noticeable, while others are highly disturbing--yet existing detection methods treat them equally. We propose artifact prominence as an evaluative target, defined as the fraction of viewers who judge a highlighted region to contain a noticeable artifact. We design a crowdsourced annotation protocol and construct SR-Prominence, a dataset suite containing 3,935 artifact masks from DeSRA, Open Images, Urban100, and a realistic no-ground-truth Urban100-HR setting, annotated with prominence. Re-annotating DeSRA reveals that 48.2% of its in-lab binary artifacts are not noticed by a majority of viewers. Across the suite, we audit SR artifact detectors, image-quality metrics, and SR methods. We find that classical full-reference metrics, especially SSIM and DISTS, provide surprisingly strong localized prominence signals, whereas no-reference IQA methods and specialized artifact detectors often fail to generalize across datasets and reference settings. SR-Prominence is released with an objective scoring protocol that allows new metrics to be benchmarked on our suite without further crowdsourcing. Together, the data and protocols enable SR artifact evaluation to move from binary defect presence toward perceptual impact. SR-Prominence is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/imolodetskikh/sr-artifact-prominence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出以"显著性"（prominence）作为评估超分图像伪影的新指标，即观众注意到伪影的比例。构建了SR-Prominence数据集（3935个伪影掩码并标注显著性），发现传统全参考指标（SSIM、DISTS）在局部伪影显著性评估上表现优异，而专用检测器泛化能力差。
AI.motivation: 现有的超分伪影检测方法将所有伪影同等对待，但不同伪影的感知影响差异巨大——有些几乎不可见，有些则非常令人不适。需要一种基于感知影响（而非简单二元存在）的评估方法。
AI.method: 1) 定义"伪影显著性"为注意到伪影的观众比例；2) 设计众包标注协议，构建SR-Prominence数据集（含DeSRA、Open Images、Urban100及无参考的Urban100-HR）；3) 重新标注DeSRA发现48.2%的二元伪影未被多数观众注意到；4) 评估多种检测器、图像质量指标和超分方法。
AI.result: 1) 传统全参考指标（SSIM、DISTS）在局部伪影显著性评估上表现突出；2) 无参考IQA方法和专用伪影检测器跨数据集泛化能力差；3) 发布了客观评分协议，无需额外众包即可基准测试新指标。
AI.conclusion: 超分伪影评估应从二元存在向感知影响转变。SR-Prominence数据集和协议为这一转变提供了基础设施。

title: Slower Generalization, Faster Memorization: A Sweet Spot in Algorithmic Learning
summary: Critical-data-size accounts of grokking suggest a natural post-threshold intuition: once training data is sufficient to identify the underlying rule, additional data should accelerate validation convergence. We show that this intuition can fail in a controlled structured-output task. In Needleman--Wunsch (NW) matrix generation, small Transformers reach high validation exact-match accuracy fastest at an intermediate dataset size, not at the largest one. Past this dataset-size sweet spot, generalization remains achievable but requires more gradient updates. Conversely, in the regime where partial validation competence first appears, larger datasets can require fewer updates to reach high training accuracy, suggesting that emerging rule structure can accelerate fitting beyond example-wise memorization. A multiplication baseline does not show the same post-threshold slowdown. These results separate the critical data size for the onset of generalization from the dataset size that optimizes update-based convergence, and identify structured-output tasks where learning the rule and completing exact-fitting can diverge.

AI.tldr: 在Needleman-Wunsch矩阵生成任务中，小型Transformer存在一个数据集大小的"甜点"：中间大小的数据集能最快达到高验证准确率，而更大的数据集反而需要更多梯度更新，这与"数据越多收敛越快"的直觉相悖。
AI.motivation: 质疑"临界数据量"理论的自然推论——即超过阈值后更多数据应加速收敛——并证明在结构化输出任务中该直觉可能失效。
AI.method: 在Needleman-Wunsch矩阵生成这一结构化输出任务上，训练小型Transformer，系统性地变化训练数据集大小，观察验证精确匹配准确率和训练收敛速度的变化。
AI.result: 1）存在数据集大小甜点：中等数据量下验证准确率收敛最快，更大数据量反而需要更多更新；2）在部分验证能力初现时，更大数据集可加速达到高训练准确率；3）乘法基线任务未观察到同样的后阈值减速现象。
AI.conclusion: 将"泛化开始的临界数据量"与"优化收敛速度最优的数据集大小"分离开来，指出在结构化输出任务中，学习规则与完成精确拟合可能产生分歧。

title: FutureSim: Replaying World Events to Evaluate Adaptive Agents
summary: AI agents are being increasingly deployed in dynamic, open-ended environments that require adapting to new information as it arrives. To efficiently measure this capability for realistic use-cases, we propose building grounded simulations that replay real-world events in the order they occurred. We build FutureSim, where agents forecast world events beyond their knowledge cutoff while interacting with a chronological replay of the world: real news articles arriving and questions resolving over the simulated period. We evaluate frontier agents in their native harness, testing their ability to predict world events over a three-month period from January to March 2026. FutureSim reveals a clear separation in their capabilities, with the best agent's accuracy being 25%, and many having worse Brier skill score than making no prediction at all. Through careful ablations, we show how FutureSim offers a realistic setting to study emerging research directions like long-horizon test-time adaptation, search, memory, and reasoning about uncertainty. Overall, we hope our benchmark design paves the way to measure AI progress on open-ended adaptation spanning long time-horizons in the real world.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 FutureSim，一个通过回放真实世界新闻流来评估 AI 智能体在动态开放环境中长期适应能力的基准。实验发现，即使是最佳智能体在预测未来三个月世界事件时，准确率也仅达 25%，许多模型的表现甚至不如不做任何预测。
AI.motivation: 现有基准缺乏对 AI 智能体在动态、开放环境中实时适应新信息能力的有效评估。研究希望构建一个更贴近现实使用场景的评估方法，衡量智能体在超出其知识截止日期后，如何利用持续流入的新信息进行预测和决策。
AI.method: 构建 FutureSim 基准，通过按时间顺序回放真实新闻文章和不断变化的问题，模拟世界事件的真实演进过程。智能体需要在此模拟环境中预测 2026 年 1 月至 3 月期间的世界事件，同时与实时更新的新闻流进行交互。
AI.result: 最佳智能体的预测准确率仅为 25%，许多智能体的 Brier 技能分数甚至比不做任何预测更差。通过消融实验，揭示了智能体在长期测试时适应、搜索、记忆和不确定性推理等能力上的显著不足。
AI.conclusion: FutureSim 为衡量 AI 在真实世界长时间跨度下的开放适应能力提供了有效基准，揭示了当前前沿模型在这项任务上的巨大差距，并指出了未来值得研究的关键方向。

title: FactorizedHMR: A Hybrid Framework for Video Human Mesh Recovery
summary: Human Mesh Recovery (HMR) is fundamentally ambiguous: under occlusion or weak depth cues, multiple 3D bodies can explain the same image evidence. This ambiguity is not uniform across the body, as torso pose and root structure are often relatively well constrained, whereas distal articulations such as the arms and legs are more uncertain. Building on this observation, we propose FactorizedHMR, a two-stage framework that treats these two regimes differently. A deterministic regression module first recovers a stable torso-root anchor, and a probabilistic flow-matching module then completes the remaining non-torso articulation. To make this completion reliable, we combine a composite target representation with geometry-aware supervision and feature-aware classifier-free guidance, preserving the torso-root anchor while improving single-reference recovery of ambiguity-prone articulation. We also introduce a synthetic data pipeline that provides the paired image-camera-motion supervision under diverse viewpoints. Across camera-space and world-space benchmarks, FactorizedHMR remains competitive with strong baselines, with the clearest gains in occlusion-heavy recovery and drift-sensitive world-space metrics.

AI.tldr: 提出FactorizedHMR，将人体网格恢复分为确定性躯干根回归和概率性流动匹配两个阶段，通过合成数据管道和特征引导，在遮挡和世界空间指标上取得优势。
AI.motivation: 人体网格恢复存在固有的模糊性，尤其在遮挡或弱深度线索下，不同身体部位的歧义程度不同（躯干较确定，四肢更不确定），现有方法未针对这种非均匀歧义进行差异化处理。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：1）确定性回归模块恢复稳定的躯干根锚点；2）概率性流动匹配模块完成剩余非躯干关节的姿态生成。结合复合目标表示、几何感知监督和特征感知无分类器引导，并引入合成数据管道提供多样化视角的成对图像-相机-运动监督。
AI.result: 在相机空间和世界空间基准上，FactorizedHMR与强基线方法保持竞争力，在重度遮挡恢复和世界空间漂移敏感指标上取得最明显增益。
AI.conclusion: 针对人体不同部位歧义程度差异进行分阶段处理是有效的，合成的多样化数据有助于提升模型在复杂场景下的鲁棒性。

title: OpenDeepThink: Parallel Reasoning via Bradley--Terry Aggregation
summary: Test-time compute scaling is a primary axis for improving LLM reasoning. Existing methods primarily scale depth by extending a single reasoning trace. Scaling breadth by sampling multiple candidates in parallel is straightforward, but introduces a selection bottleneck: choosing the best candidate without a ground-truth verifier, since pointwise LLM judging is noisy and biased. To address this, we introduce OpenDeepThink, a population-based test-time compute framework that selects via pairwise Bradley-Terry comparison. Each generation, the LLM judges random pairs of candidates and aggregates votes via Bradley-Terry into a global ranking; top-ranked candidates are preserved and the top three quarters are mutated using the natural-language critiques produced during comparison; the bottom quarter is discarded. OpenDeepThink raises Gemini 3.1 Pro's effective Codeforces Elo by +405 points in eight sequential LLM-call rounds (~27 minutes wall-clock). The pipeline transfers across weaker and stronger models without retuning, and on the multi-domain HLE benchmark, gains appear concentrated in objectively verifiable domains and reverse in subjective ones. We release CF-73, a curated set of 73 expert-rated Codeforces problems with International Grandmaster annotation and 99% local-evaluation agreement against the official verdict.

AI.tldr: 提出OpenDeepThink框架，通过成对Bradley-Terry比较和种群演化策略扩展测试时计算的广度，显著提升LLM推理能力，在Codeforces Elo上提升+405分。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时计算扩展主要沿深度方向（延长单条推理链），广度方向（并行采样多个候选）虽直接但面临选择瓶颈——缺乏真实验证器时，逐点LLM评判存在噪声和偏差。
AI.method: 基于种群的测试时计算框架：每轮LLM对随机候选对进行成对比较并投票，通过Bradley-Terry模型聚合为全局排名；保留排名靠前的候选，对前75%使用比较中产生的自然语言批评进行变异，丢弃后25%。
AI.result: Gemini 3.1 Pro在8轮LLM调用（约27分钟）内Codeforces Elo提升+405分；框架跨模型迁移无需重新调参；在HLE基准上，增益集中在客观可验证领域，在主观领域效果逆转。
AI.conclusion: 基于成对比较和种群演化的广度扩展策略有效提升LLM推理，且具有跨模型通用性和领域特异性。

title: AQKA: Active Quantum Kernel Acquisition Under a Shot Budget
summary: Estimating an $N \times N$ quantum kernel from circuit fidelities requires $Θ(N^2 S)$ measurement shots, the dominant bottleneck for deployment on near-term hardware. Existing budget-saving methods (Nyström-QKE, ShoFaR, kernel-target alignment) sub-sample \emph{which} entries to measure but allocate shots \emph{uniformly} within their chosen subset, ignoring how much each entry drives the downstream classifier. We close this gap with two contributions. \textbf{First, a complete regime decomposition} for shot-budgeted quantum kernel learning: a principled menu of when each allocator wins. Our method, \emph{AQKA}, dominates the budget-limited regime ($B \lesssim 16 n_{\mathrm{pairs}}$) on sparse-sensitivity KRR, with the gap \emph{growing} from $+8$ to $+25$ pts over uniform as $N$ scales $225{\to}1000$ and reaching $+26$--$32$ pts on an \texttt{ibm\_pittsburgh} (156-qubit Heron) hardware kernel; Nyström-QKE wins at saturating budgets on planted-sparse via low-rank reconstruction; ShoFaR is competitive only at extreme low budgets. \textbf{Second, a closed-form pair-level acquisition theory}: $s_{ij}^{\star} \propto |g_{ij}|\sqrt{K_{ij}(1-K_{ij})}$ with explicit gradient $g_{ij}$ for KRR (Lemma~1, $|β_iα_j+β_jα_i|\sqrt{K_{ij}(1-K_{ij})}$) and SVM via the envelope theorem ($|η_i^*η_j^*|\sqrt{K_{ij}(1-K_{ij})}$); a \emph{corrected} sparsity-aware Cauchy--Schwarz rate $ρ\le 2m/N$ matching empirics (vs.\ the naive $m^2/N^2$); an explicit-constant plug-in regret bound (Theorem~2); and a tighter SVM ceiling $ρ^{\mathrm{SVM}} \le m_{\mathrm{sv}}^2/N^2$. We close with the first multi-seed live online adaptive shot allocation on quantum hardware: $+17.0 \pm 4.8$ pts at $N{=}20$ on \texttt{ibm\_aachen} ($3.5σ$, 5 seeds), with the advantage holding at $N{=}30$ at higher budget on \texttt{ibm\_berlin} ($+14.0 \pm 8.5$ pts, 5 seeds).

AI.tldr: 本文针对量子核学习中测量预算分配问题，提出自适应分配方法AQKA，在有限预算下比均匀分配提升8-32个百分点的分类准确率，并给出了闭式最优分配公式，在真实量子硬件上实现首个在线自适应分配实验。
AI.motivation: 现有量子核估计方法（Nyström-QKE、ShoFaR等）虽然通过子采样减少了需要测量的矩阵条目数量，但在分配测量次数（shots）时对所有选中的条目采用均匀分配策略，忽略了不同条目对下游分类器的贡献差异，导致预算浪费。
AI.method: 1) 提出了完整的预算分配策略的机制分解（regime decomposition），明确不同分配器在何种预算区间占优；2) 给出了闭式的pair级最优分配理论：s_{ij}^* ∝ |g_{ij}|√(K_{ij}(1-K_{ij}))，针对KRR和SVM分别推导了梯度形式；3) 提出了自适应量子核分配方法AQKA，并给出了修正的Cauchy-Schwarz稀疏度上界和遗憾界。
AI.result: AQKA在稀疏敏感KRR任务中，N从225到1000时，相比均匀分配优势从+8增加到+25个百分点；在156量子比特的Heron量子硬件上达到+26-32个百分点的提升；在ibm_aachen（N=20）和ibm_berlin（N=30）上分别取得+17.0±4.8和+14.0±8.5个百分点的提升（5种子实验）。
AI.conclusion: 证明了自适应shot分配在量子核学习中至关重要，在不同预算区间有不同最优分配策略；AQKA在预算受限场景下显著优于均匀分配，且理论分析与实际实验一致。

title: ATLAS: Agentic or Latent Visual Reasoning? One Word is Enough for Both
summary: Visual reasoning, often interleaved with intermediate visual states, has emerged as a promising direction in the field. A straightforward approach is to directly generate images via unified models during reasoning, but this is computationally expensive and architecturally non-trivial. Recent alternatives include agentic reasoning through code or tool calls, and latent reasoning with learnable hidden embeddings. However, agentic methods incur context-switching latency from external execution, while latent methods lack task generalization and are difficult to train with autoregressive parallelization. To combine their strengths while mitigating their limitations, we propose ATLAS, a framework in which a single discrete 'word', termed as a functional token, serves both as an agentic operation and a latent visual reasoning unit. Each functional token is associated with an internalized visual operation, yet requires no visual supervision and remains a standard token in the tokenizer vocabulary, which can be generated via next-token prediction. This design avoids verbose intermediate visual content generation, while preserving compatibility with the vanilla scalable SFT and RL training, without architectural or methodological modifications. To further address the sparsity of functional tokens during RL, we introduce Latent-Anchored GRPO (LA-GRPO), which stabilizes the training by anchoring functional tokens with a statically weighted auxiliary objective, providing stronger gradient updates. Extensive experiments and analyses demonstrate that ATLAS achieves superior performance on challenging benchmarks while maintaining clear interpretability. We hope ATLAS offers a new paradigm inspiring future visual reasoning research.

AI.tldr: 提出ATLAS框架，通过"功能令牌"（functional token）统一代理操作与潜在视觉推理，在不生成中间图像、不修改架构的前提下实现高效视觉推理，并引入LA-GRPO稳定训练。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉推理方法存在两难：直接生成图像计算昂贵；代理方法（代码/工具调用）有上下文切换延迟；潜在方法泛化差且训练困难。作者希望结合两者优势，同时避免各自的局限性。
AI.method: 提出ATLAS框架：1) 设计"功能令牌"（functional token），既是代理操作又是潜在视觉推理单元；2) 令牌与内部化视觉操作关联，但无需视觉监督，是标准词汇表令牌；3) 通过next-token prediction生成，避免生成中间视觉内容；4) 兼容标准SFT和RL训练；5) 针对RL中功能令牌稀疏问题，提出LA-GRPO（Latent-Anchored GRPO），用静态加权辅助目标锚定功能令牌。
AI.result: 在多个具有挑战性的基准测试上取得优越性能，同时保持清晰的解释性。
AI.conclusion: ATLAS提供了一种新的视觉推理范式，通过功能令牌统一了代理方法与潜在方法的优势，为未来视觉推理研究提供新方向。

title: LPH-VTON: Resolving the Structure-Texture Dilemma of Virtual Try-On via Latent Process Handover
summary: Virtual Try-On (VTON) aims to synthesize photorealistic images of garments precisely aligned with a person's body and pose. Current diffusion-based methods, however, face a fundamental trade-off between structural integrity and textural fidelity. In this paper, we formalize this challenge as a consequence of complementary inductive biases inherent in prevailing architectures: models heavily reliant on spatial constraints naturally favor geometric alignment but often suppress textures, whereas models dominated by unconstrained generative priors excel at vibrant detail rendering but are prone to structural drift. Based on this diagnosis, we propose LPH-VTON, a new synergistic framework that resolves this tension within a single, continuous denoising process. LPH-VTON strategically decomposes the generation, leveraging a structure-biased model to establish a geometrically consistent latent scaffold in the early stages, before handing over control to a texture-biased model for high-fidelity detail rendering. Extensive experiments validate our approach. Our model achieves a superior Pareto-optimal balance, establishing new benchmarks in perceptual faithfulness while maintaining highly competitive structural alignment across the standard dataset VITON-HD, proving the efficacy of temporal architectural decoupling.

AI.tldr: LPH-VTON通过解耦生成过程，在早期使用结构偏向模型建立几何一致的潜在框架，后期切换至纹理偏向模型进行高保真细节渲染，解决了虚拟试穿中结构完整性与纹理保真度之间的根本权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 当前扩散模型在虚拟试穿中面临结构完整性与纹理保真度之间的固有权衡：强空间约束模型擅长几何对齐但抑制纹理，而弱约束生成模型擅长细节渲染但易出现结构漂移。作者希望解决这一矛盾。
AI.method: 提出LPH-VTON框架，在单一连续去噪过程中策略性地分解生成：早期阶段使用结构偏向模型建立几何一致的潜在支架，后期阶段切换至纹理偏向模型进行高保真细节渲染，实现时间维度的架构解耦。
AI.result: 在VITON-HD标准数据集上达到帕累托最优平衡，在感知真实性方面树立了新标杆，同时保持高度竞争力的结构对齐效果。
AI.conclusion: 时间维度的架构解耦策略有效解决了虚拟试穿中的结构-纹理权衡问题，证明了该方法的有效性。

title: Hidden State Poisoning Attacks against Mamba-based Language Models
summary: State space models (SSMs) like Mamba offer efficient alternatives to Transformer-based language models, with linear time complexity. Yet, their adversarial robustness remains critically unexplored. This paper studies the phenomenon whereby specific short input phrases induce a partial amnesia effect in such models, by irreversibly overwriting information in their hidden states, referred to as a Hidden State Poisoning Attack (HiSPA). Our benchmark RoBench-25 allows evaluating a model's information retrieval capabilities when subject to HiSPAs, and confirms the vulnerability of SSMs against such attacks. Even the recent Jamba-1.7-Mini SSM--Transformer (a 52B hybrid model) collapses on RoBench-25 under some HiSPA triggers, whereas pure Transformers do not. We also observe that HiSPA triggers significantly weaken the Jamba model on the popular Open-Prompt-Injections benchmark, unlike pure Transformers. We further show that the theoretical and empirical findings extend to Mamba-2, and also analyse a Mamba-2-based hybrid (Nemotron-3-Nano). Finally, our interpretability study reveals patterns in Mamba's hidden layers during HiSPAs that could be used to build a HiSPA mitigation system. The full code and data to reproduce the experiments can be found at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/hispa_anonymous-5DB0.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对状态空间模型（SSM，如Mamba）的隐藏状态投毒攻击（HiSPA），发现特定短输入短语可导致SSM产生局部失忆效应，并构建了RoBench-25基准来评估该漏洞。实验表明SSM及混合模型（如Jamba-1.7-Mini）易受攻击，而纯Transformer不受影响，最后通过可解释性研究探索了防御方法。
AI.motivation: 状态空间模型（如Mamba）作为Transformer的高效替代方案日益流行，但其对抗鲁棒性尚未得到充分研究。作者希望探索SSM在对抗攻击下的脆弱性，特别是是否存在Transformer不具备的独特漏洞。
AI.method: 提出隐藏状态投毒攻击（HiSPA），通过特定短输入短语不可逆地覆写模型隐藏状态信息；构建RoBench-25基准测试评估信息检索能力；在多种SSM、混合模型和纯Transformer上进行对比实验；进行可解释性分析揭示攻击下隐藏层模式。
AI.result: SSM（Mamba、Mamba-2）及混合模型（Jamba-1.7-Mini 52B、Nemotron-3-Nano）在HiSPA攻击下性能显著下降，而纯Transformer不受影响。HiSPA触发词也能削弱Jamba在Open-Prompt-Injections基准上的表现。
AI.conclusion: SSM存在一种Transformer不具备的独特安全漏洞——隐藏状态投毒攻击，需开发专门的缓解机制。可解释性研究中发现的隐藏层模式可用于构建防御系统。

title: Spontaneous symmetry breaking and Goldstone modes for deep information propagation
summary: In physical systems, whenever a continuous symmetry is spontaneously broken, the system possesses excitations called Goldstone modes, which allow coherent information propagation over long distances and times. In this work, we study deep neural networks whose internal layers are equivariant under a continuous symmetry and may therefore support analogous Goldstone-like degrees of freedom. We demonstrate, both analytically and empirically, that these degrees of freedom enable coherent signal propagation across depth and recurrent iterations, providing a mechanism for stable information flow without relying on architectural stabilizers such as residual connections or normalization. In feedforward networks, this results in improved trainability and representational diversity across layers. In recurrent settings, we demonstrate the same mechanism is valuable for long-term memory by propagating information over recurrent iterations, thereby improving performance of RNNs and GRUs on long-sequence modeling tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了深度神经网络中连续对称性自发破缺产生的Goldstone模式，发现这些模式能够在不依赖残差连接或归一化的情况下，实现深度和前馈迭代中的稳定信号传播，从而提升可训练性、表示多样性和长序列建模性能。
AI.motivation: 物理系统中连续对称性自发破缺会产生Goldstone模式，实现长距离信息传播。作者试图探索深度神经网络中是否也存在类似机制，以及这些机制能否替代残差连接等架构稳定器。
AI.method: 理论分析和实验验证相结合。理论上推导了连续等变网络中层内Goldstone-like自由度的存在；实验上在纯等变的前馈网络和循环网络（RNN/GRU）中测试了信号传播能力和训练效果。
AI.result: Goldstone-like自由度能够在不使用残差连接或归一化的情况下实现深度网络中信号的稳定传播；前馈网络中提升了可训练性和层间表示多样性；循环网络中改善了长序列建模性能。
AI.conclusion: 等变网络中的Goldstone-like自由度为深度和循环网络提供了一种新的稳定信息传播机制，有潜力替代传统架构稳定器，对长序列建模任务尤其有价值。

title: Unlocking Complex Visual Generation via Closed-Loop Verified Reasoning
summary:
Despite rapid advancements, current text-to-image (T2I) models predominantly rely on a single-step generation paradigm, which struggles with complex semantics and faces diminishing returns from parameter scaling.
  While recent multi-step reasoning approaches show promise, they are hindered by ungrounded planning hallucinations lacking verification, monolithic post-hoc reflection, long-context optimization instabilities, and prohibitive inference latency. To overcome these bottlenecks, we propose the Closed-Loop Visual Reasoning (CLVR) framework, a comprehensive system that deeply couples visual-language logical planning with pixel-level diffusion generation. CLVR introduces an automated data engine with step-level visual verification to synthesize reliable reasoning trajectories, and proposes Proxy Prompt Reinforcement Learning (PPRL) to resolve long-context optimization instabilities by distilling interleaved multimodal histories into explicit reward signals for accurate causal attribution. Furthermore, to mitigate the severe latency bottleneck caused by iterative denoising, we propose $Δ$-Space Weight Merge (DSWM), a theoretically grounded method that fuses alignment weights with off-the-shelf distillation priors, reducing the per-step inference cost to just 4 NFEs without requiring expensive re-distillation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CLVR outperforms existing open-source baselines across multiple benchmarks and approaches the performance of proprietary commercial models, unlocking general test-time scaling capabilities for complex visual generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出闭环视觉推理（CLVR）框架，通过视觉-语言逻辑规划与扩散生成深度耦合，引入自动化数据引擎、代理提示强化学习（PPRL）和Δ-空间权重合并（DSWM）等方法，在仅需4次推理步骤下超越现有开源基线，接近商业模型性能，实现了复杂视觉生成中的测试时扩展能力。
AI.motivation: 当前文本到图像模型主要依赖单步生成范式，难以处理复杂语义且参数扩展收益递减；而现有多步推理方法存在规划幻觉、缺乏验证、优化不稳定和推理延迟高等问题。
AI.method: 1) 自动化数据引擎：结合步骤级视觉验证合成可靠的推理轨迹；2) 代理提示强化学习（PPRL）：将交错多模态历史蒸馏为显式奖励信号，解决长上下文优化不稳定问题；3) Δ-空间权重合并（DSWM）：融合对齐权重与蒸馏先验，将每步推理成本降至仅4次神经函数评估。
AI.result: 在多个基准上超越现有开源基线，性能接近专有商业模型，实现了通用测试时扩展能力。
AI.conclusion: CLVR框架通过闭环视觉推理有效解决了单步生成范式的局限，为复杂视觉生成提供了一种高效且可扩展的新范式。

title: ReMIA: a Powerful and Efficient Alternative to Membership Inference Attacks against Synthetic Data Generators
summary: Tabular data sharing under privacy constraints is increasingly important for research and collaboration. Synthetic data generators (SDGs) are a promising solution, but synthetic data remains vulnerable to attacks, such as membership inference attacks (MIAs), which aim to determine whether a specific record was part of the training data. State-of-the-art MIAs are powerful but impractical: they rely on shadow modeling, requiring hundreds of SDG training runs, and need auxiliary data several times larger than the original training set. Fast proxy metrics like distance to closest record (DCR) are efficient but have limited sensitivity to MIA risk. We introduce ReMIA (Relative Membership Inference Attack), a practical privacy metric that requires only two SDG training runs and additional data no larger than the original training set. Rather than predicting whether a record was in the training set, ReMIA generates two synthetic datasets from two source datasets and measures whether a classifier can identify which source a record came from. Experiments across multiple tabular datasets and SDGs show that ReMIA has a sensitivity comparable to state-of-the-art MIAs while being substantially more practical. We further observe that SDGs can achieve privacy-utility trade-offs that traditional noise-based anonymization methods do not match. Code is available at https://github.com/aindo-com/remia.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReMIA，一种实用的成员推理攻击隐私度量方法，仅需两次SDG训练和少量辅助数据，即可达到与最先进方法相当的敏感性。
AI.motivation: 现有成员推理攻击（MIA）要么依赖阴影模型导致计算成本极高（需数百次SDG训练），要么使用快速代理指标（如DCR）但敏感性不足。需要一种既实用又敏感的隐私度量方法。
AI.method: ReMIA只进行两次SDG训练，生成两个合成数据集，然后通过分类器判断记录来自哪个源数据集，以此替代直接判断记录是否在训练集中。
AI.result: 在多个表格数据集和SDG上的实验表明，ReMIA的敏感性与最先进的MIA相当，但实用性显著提升；且SDG能实现传统噪声方法无法达到的隐私-效用权衡。
AI.conclusion: ReMIA是一种高效实用的隐私度量工具，大幅降低了计算成本，同时保持了高敏感性，有望推动隐私保护数据共享的实际应用。

title: HeatKV: Head-tuned KV-cache Compression for Visual Autoregressive Modeling
comment: 18 pages total including appendix; 6 main-paper figures, 2 appendix figures; 4 tables
summary: Visual Autoregressive (VAR) models have recently demonstrated impressive image generation quality while maintaining low latency. However, they suffer from severe KV-cache memory constraints, often requiring gigabytes of memory per generated image. We introduce HeatKV, a novel compression method that adapts cache allocation in each head based on its attention to previously generated scales. Using a small offline calibration set, the attention heads are ranked according to their attention scores over prior scales. Based on this ranking, we construct a static pruning schedule tailored to a given memory budget. Applied to the Infinity-2B model, HeatKV achieves $2 \times$ higher compression ratio in memory allocation for KV cache compared to existing methods, while maintaining similar or better image fidelity, prompt alignment and human perception score. Our method achieves a new state-of-the-art (SOTA) for VAR model KV-cache compression, showcasing the effectiveness of fine-grained, head-specific cache allocation.

AI.tldr: HeatKV提出了一种针对视觉自回归（VAR）模型的KV缓存压缩方法，通过基于注意力分数的头部特定缓存分配，在相同或更优的图像质量下实现了2倍更高的压缩比，达到了VAR模型KV缓存压缩的新SOTA。
AI.motivation: VAR模型虽然图像生成质量高、延迟低，但存在严重的KV缓存内存瓶颈，每张生成图像需要数GB内存，制约了其实际部署。
AI.method: HeatKV通过离线校准集评估每个注意力头对先前尺度的注意力分数，据此对所有注意力头进行排序，然后根据内存预算构建静态剪枝调度，实现细粒度的、按头分配的缓存压缩策略。
AI.result: 在Infinity-2B模型上，HeatKV相比现有方法实现了2倍更高的KV缓存压缩比，同时保持或提升了图像保真度、提示对齐度和人类感知评分，达到了VAR模型KV缓存压缩的新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 实验证明了细粒度、按头分配的缓存策略在VAR模型KV缓存压缩中的有效性，HeatKV为缓解VAR模型内存瓶颈提供了高效解决方案。

title: The Rate-Distortion-Polysemanticity Tradeoff in SAEs
summary: Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) that can accurately reconstruct their input (minimizing distortion) by making efficient use of few features (minimizing the rate) often fail to learn monosemantic representations (highly interpretable), limiting their usefulness for mechanistic interpretability. In this paper, we characterise this tension in learning faithful, efficient, and interpretable explanations, introducing the Rate-Distortion-Polysemanticity tradeoff in SAEs. Under toy-modeling assumptions, we theoretically and empirically show that restricting the SAE to be monosemantic necessarily comes with an increase in rate and distortion. Assuming a generative model behind the input observations, we further demonstrate that the degree of polysemanticity of optimal SAEs is determined by the training data distribution, especially by the probability of features to co-occur. Finally, we extend the analysis to real-world settings by deriving necessary conditions that a polysemanticity measure should satisfy when the data-generating process is unknown, and we benchmark existing proxy metrics on SAEs trained on Large Language Models. Taken together, our findings show that polysemanticity is a data problem that should be accounted for when addressing it at the architectural and optimization level.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了稀疏自编码器（SAE）在忠实、高效与可解释性之间的权衡，提出了率-失真-多义性（Rate-Distortion-Polysemanticity）权衡理论，证明限制SAE为单义性必然增加率与失真，且多义性程度由训练数据分布决定，尤其是特征共现概率。
AI.motivation: 现有的SAE虽然能通过少量特征高效重建输入（低失真、低率），但学到的表示往往是多义的（不可解释），限制了其在 mechanistic interpretability 中的应用。作者旨在揭示这一矛盾的本质。
AI.method: 通过玩具模型进行理论与实证分析，证明单义性约束必然带来率与失真的增加；基于生成模型假设，推导最优SAE的多义性程度由数据分布（尤其是特征共现概率）决定；扩展至真实场景，推导多义性度量的必要条件，并对LLM上训练的SAE进行基准测试。
AI.result: 理论证明单义性必然增加率与失真；特征共现概率越高，最优SAE的多义性越强；提出了真实场景下多义性度量应满足的必要条件。
AI.conclusion: 多义性本质上是数据分布问题，应在架构和优化层面予以考虑，而不是单纯追求单义性。

title: Denoising-GS: Gaussian Splatting with Spatial-aware Denoising
summary: Recent advances in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have achieved remarkable success in high-fidelity Novel View Synthesis (NVS), yet the optimization process inevitably introduces noisy Gaussian primitives due to the sparse and incomplete initialization from Structure-from-Motion (SfM) point clouds. Most existing methods focus solely on adjusting the positions of primitives during optimization, while neglecting the underlying spatial structure. To this end, we introduce a new perspective by formulating the optimization of 3DGS as a primitive denoising process and propose Denoising-GS, a spatial-aware denoising framework for Gaussian primitives by taking both the positions and spatial structure into consideration. Specifically, we design an optimizer that preserves the spatial optimization flow of primitives, facilitating coherent and directed denoising rather than random perturbations. Building upon this, the Spatial Gradient-based Denoising strategy jointly considers the spatial supports of primitives to ensure gradient-consistent updates. Furthermore, the Uncertainty-based Denoising module estimates primitive-wise uncertainty to prune redundant or noisy primitives, while the Spatial Coherence Refinement strategy selectively splits primitives in sparse regions to maintain structural completeness. Experiments conducted on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that Denoising-GS consistently enhances NVS fidelity while maintaining representation compactness, achieving state-of-the-art performance across all benchmarks. Source code and models will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Denoising-GS，将3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）的优化过程重新定义为原始去噪过程，通过考虑位置和空间结构的空间感知去噪框架，包括空间梯度去噪、不确定性剪枝和空间一致性细化等策略，在三个基准数据集上实现了最先进的新视角合成性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3DGS方法在优化过程中仅调整原始位置而忽略了潜在的空间结构，且从SfM点云初始化的高斯原始存在稀疏和不完整的问题，导致噪声引入。
AI.method: 1) 设计保持原始空间优化流的优化器；2) 空间梯度去噪策略联合考虑原始的空间支持以实现梯度一致更新；3) 不确定性去噪模块估计原始级不确定性以剪枝冗余或噪声原始；4) 空间一致性细化策略在稀疏区域选择性分裂原始以保持结构完整性。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上，Denoising-GS一致提升了NVS保真度并保持了表示紧凑性，实现了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 将3DGS优化视为原始去噪过程并引入空间感知机制，能够有效提升新视角合成质量。

title: NeuroAtlas: Benchmarking Foundation Models for Clinical EEG and Brain-Computer Interfaces
summary: Foundation models (FMs) promise to extract unified representations that generalize across downstream tasks. They have emerged across fields, including electroencephalography (EEG), but it is less clear how effective they are in this particular field. Published evaluations differ in datasets, in the EEG-specific preprocessing that might influence reported results, and in the reported metrics, frequently obscuring the clinical relevance in EEG. We introduce NeuroAtlas, the largest EEG benchmark to date: 42 datasets and 260k hours covering clinical EEG (epilepsy, sleep medicine, brain age estimation) and brain-computer interfaces, and include multiple datasets per task along with bespoke clinical evaluation metrics. Besides evaluating EEG-FMs with respect to supervised baselines, we present results from generic time-series FMs. We report three findings. First, EEG-specific FMs do not consistently outperform time-series FMs, which have neither EEG-focused architectures nor been pretrained on EEG. Second, standard machine learning metrics are insufficient to assess clinical utility: thus, we thoroughly evaluate more appropriate measures such as the quality of event-level decision-making, hypnogram-derived features, and the brain-age gap in the domains of epilepsy, sleep, and brain age, respectively. Third, model rankings and performance can vary substantially within domains. We conclude that pretrained models perform largely on par, with only narrow advantages for a few, and that current models do not yet deliver on the promise of an out-of-the-box unified EEG model. NeuroAtlas exposes this gap and provides the datasets and metrics for the next generation of unified EEG FMs.

AI.tldr: NeuroAtlas是迄今为止最大的EEG基准测试，包含42个数据集和26万小时数据，覆盖临床EEG和脑机接口。研究发现：1) EEG专用基础模型并未一致优于通用时间序列模型；2) 标准机器学习指标不足以评估临床效用；3) 模型排名和性能在领域内差异显著。当前模型尚未实现统一的EEG基础模型承诺。
AI.motivation: 现有EEG基础模型评估存在数据集、预处理和指标不统一的问题，且常忽视临床相关性。需要一个大规模、标准化的基准来系统评估EEG基础模型的实际效果。
AI.method: 构建NeuroAtlas基准，包含42个数据集和26万小时数据，涵盖癫痫、睡眠医学、脑年龄估计和脑机接口领域。采用针对性的临床评估指标（如事件级决策质量、催眠图特征、脑年龄差距），系统比较EEG专用基础模型与通用时间序列基础模型及监督基线。
AI.result: 1) EEG专用基础模型不优于通用时间序列模型；2) 标准ML指标不足以评估临床效用；3) 同一领域内模型排名和性能波动大。
AI.conclusion: 当前预测训练模型表现大体相当，仅少数有微弱优势，尚未实现开箱即用的统一EEG模型。NeuroAtlas揭示了这一差距，并为下一代统一EEG基础模型提供了数据集和评估指标。

title: Masked Next-Scale Prediction for Self-supervised Scene Text Recognition
comment: Accepted to the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026 Findings Track.10 pages, 4 figures
summary: Scene Text Recognition requires modeling visual structures that evolve from coarse layouts to fine-grained character strokes. Training such models relies on large amounts of annotated data. Recent self-supervised approaches, such as Masked Image Modeling (MIM), alleviate this dependency by leveraging large-scale unlabeled data. Yet most existing MIM methods operate at a single spatial scale and fail to capture the hierarchical nature of scene text. In this work, we introduce Masked Next-Scale Prediction (MNSP), a unified self-supervised framework designed to explicitly model cross-scale structural evolution. The framework incorporates Next-Scale Prediction (NSP), which learns hierarchical representations by predicting higher-resolution features from lower-resolution contexts. Naive scale prediction, however, tends to produce spatially diffuse attention, directing the model toward background regions rather than textual structures. MNSP resolves this limitation by jointly learning cross-scale prediction and masked image reconstruction. NSP captures global layout priors across resolutions, while masked reconstruction imposes strong local constraints that guide attention toward informative text regions. A Multi-scale Linguistic Alignment module further maintains semantic consistency across different resolutions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MNSP achieves state-of-the-art performance, reaching 86.2\% average accuracy on the challenging Union14M benchmark and 96.7\% across six standard datasets. Additional analyses show that our method improves robustness under extreme scale and layout variations. Code is available at https://github.com/CzhczhcHczh/MNSP

AI.tldr: 本文提出MNSP框架，通过掩码下一尺度预测联合学习跨尺度结构演化与局部文本约束，在场景文字识别任务上达到SOTA性能（Union14M 86.2%，六标准数据集96.7%）。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督方法（如MIM）仅在单一空间尺度操作，无法捕捉场景文本从粗粒度布局到细粒度笔画的分层结构特性，且简单尺度预测会导致注意力分散到背景区域。
AI.method: 提出Masked Next-Scale Prediction (MNSP)框架，联合学习Next-Scale Prediction（捕获跨分辨率全局布局先验）与Masked Image Reconstruction（施加局部约束引导注意力聚焦文字区域），并引入多尺度语言对齐模块维护语义一致性。
AI.result: 在Union14M基准上平均准确率86.2%，六个标准数据集上平均96.7%，在极端尺度和布局变化下鲁棒性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: MNSP通过显式建模跨尺度结构演化，有效解决了场景文字识别中层次化特征学习问题，验证了多尺度自监督预训练的有效性。

title: TAPIOCA: Why Task- Aware Pruning Improves OOD model Capability
summary: Recent work has promoted task-aware layer pruning as a way to improve model performance on particular tasks, as shown by TALE. In this paper, we investigate when such improvements occur and why. We show first that, across controlled polynomial regression tasks and large language models, such pruning yields no benefit on in-distribution (ID) data but consistently improves out-of-distribution (OOD) accuracy. We further show empirically that OOD inputs induce layerwise norm and pairwise-distance profiles that deviate from the corresponding ID profiles. This leads to a geometric explanation of task-aware pruning: each task induces a task-adapted geometry, characterized empirically by the representation profiles observed on ID inputs. OOD inputs can introduce a distorted version of the task-adapted geometry. Task-aware pruning identifies layers that create or amplify this distortion; by removing them, it shifts OOD representational norms and pairwise distances toward those observed on the adapted distribution. This realigns OOD inputs with the model's task-adapted geometry and improves performance. We provide causal evidence through controlled distribution shifts and residual-scaling interventions, and demonstrate consistent behavior across model scales.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了任务感知剪枝（如TALE）的效果，发现该剪枝对同分布数据无益，但能提升分布外数据的准确率。作者从几何角度解释：每个任务有任务适应几何，OOD输入会扭曲该几何；剪枝移除造成扭曲的层，使OOD表示与适应几何重新对齐。
AI.motivation: 探究任务感知层剪枝在什么条件下能提升模型性能，以及其背后的原因。
AI.method: 在多项式回归任务和大语言模型上进行控制实验；通过分析层间范数和成对距离剖面来刻画表示几何；利用残差缩放干预和受控分布偏移提供因果证据。
AI.result: 任务感知剪枝对同分布数据无显著提升，但持续提升分布外数据准确率。OOD输入会改变层级的表示几何（范数和距离），剪枝通过移除造成扭曲的层来恢复适应几何。
AI.conclusion: 任务感知剪枝的有效性源于消除OOD输入引起的几何扭曲，使模型表示回归任务适应的几何结构。

title: SurgicalMamba: Dual-Path SSD with State Regramming for Online Surgical Phase Recognition
comment: 28 pages, 7 figures, 10 tables; Code available at https://github.com/sukjuoh/Surgical-Mamba
summary: Online surgical phase recognition (SPR) underpins context-aware operating-room systems and requires committing to a prediction at every frame from past context alone. Surgical video poses three demands that natural-video recognizers do not jointly address: procedures span tens of thousands of frames, time flows non-uniformly as long routine stretches are punctuated by brief phase-defining transitions, and the visual domain is narrow so backbone features are strongly correlated across channels. Existing recognizers either let per-frame cost grow with elapsed length, or hold cost bounded but advance state at a uniform rate with channel-independent dynamics, leaving the latter two demands unaddressed. We present SurgicalMamba, a causal SPR model built on Mamba2's structured state-space duality (SSD) that holds per-frame cost at O(d). It introduces three SSD-compatible components, each targeting one demand: a dual-path SSD block that separates long- and short-term regimes at the level of recurrent state; intensity-modulated stepping, a continuous-time time-warp that adapts the slow path's effective rate to phase-relevant information; and state regramming, a per-chunk Cayley rotation that opens cross-channel mixing in the otherwise axis-aligned SSM recurrence. The learned rotation planes inherit a phase-aligned structure without any direct supervision, offering an interpretable internal signature of surgical workflow. Across seven public SPR benchmarks, SurgicalMamba reaches state-of-the-art accuracy and phase-level Jaccard under strict online evaluation: 94.6%/82.7% on Cholec80 (+0.7 pp/+2.2 pp over the strongest prior) and 89.5%/68.9% on AutoLaparo (+1.7 pp/+2.0 pp), at 119 fps on a single GPU. Ablations isolate the contribution of each component. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/sukjuoh/Surgical-Mamba.

AI.tldr: SurgicalMamba是一种基于Mamba2的因果手术阶段识别模型，通过双路径SSD、强度调制步进和状态重编程三个组件，解决了手术视频的长序列、非均匀时间和通道相关性问题，在七个公开基准上达到SOTA，Cholec80上94.6%/82.7%，AutoLaparo上89.5%/68.9%，速度119fps。
AI.motivation: 现有手术阶段识别方法无法同时满足手术视频的三个独特需求：超长序列（数万帧）、非均匀时间流（短暂过渡被漫长常规段间隔）、窄视觉域导致特征通道高度相关。现有识别器要么每帧成本随时间增长，要么成本恒定但状态推进速率均匀且通道独立，未能解决后两个问题。
AI.method: 基于Mamba2的结构化状态空间对偶性（SSD），保持每帧O(d)成本。三个SSD兼容组件：1）双路径SSD块，在递归状态层面分离长短时程；2）强度调制步进，连续时间扭曲使慢路径有效速率适应阶段相关信息；3）状态重编程，逐块Cayley旋转打开跨通道混合。旋转平面无需监督即继承阶段对齐结构。
AI.result: 在七个公开SPR基准上达到SOTA：Cholec80准确率94.6%（+0.7pp）、阶段Jaccard 82.7%（+2.2pp）；AutoLaparo准确率89.5%（+1.7pp）、阶段Jaccard 68.9%（+2.0pp）；单GPU推理速度119fps。
AI.conclusion: SurgicalMamba通过三个针对性的SSD组件有效解决了手术视频识别的三大挑战，在多个基准上取得领先性能，且状态重编程的旋转平面提供了可解释的手术工作流内部信号，代码已开源。

title: Selective Safety Steering via Value-Filtered Decoding
summary: While large language models (LLMs) are trained to align with human values, their generations may still violate safety constraints. A growing line of work addresses this problem by modifying the model's sampling policy at decoding time using a safety reward. However, existing decoding-time steering methods often intervene unnecessarily, modifying generations that would have been safe under the base model. Such unnecessary interventions are undesirable, as they can distort key properties of the base model such as helpfulness, fluency, style, and coherence. We propose a new test-time steering method designed to reduce such unnecessary interventions while improving the safety of unsafe responses. Our approach filters tokens using a value-based safety criterion and provides an explicit bound on the probability of false interventions. A single threshold hyperparameter controls this bound, allowing practitioners to trade off higher rates of unnecessary intervention for better output safety. Across multiple datasets and experiments, we show that our value-filtered decoding method outperforms existing baselines, achieving better trade-offs between safety, helpfulness, and similarity to the base model.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于值函数的安全过滤解码方法，在测试时通过概率约束减少不必要的干预，在提升安全性的同时保持基础模型的实用性、流畅性和风格。
AI.motivation: 现有解码时安全干预方法容易过度修正本已安全的生成内容，损害基础模型的有用性、流畅性和风格等关键属性。作者旨在减少不必要干预，同时提升不安全响应的安全性。
AI.method: 提出基于值函数的安全过滤解码（Value-Filtered Decoding），用价值函数评估token安全性，设置概率上界控制虚假干预率，通过单一阈值超参数调节安全性与干预率之间的权衡。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和实验上，该方法在安全性、有用性和与基础模型相似性之间的权衡上优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于值函数的安全过滤解码能有效减少不必要的安全干预，在保证安全性的同时更好地保留基础模型的原有特性，提供了可控的权衡机制。

title: Hierarchical Image Tokenization for Multi-Scale Image Super Resolution
comment: Accepted for publication at ICML 2026. *Joint first authorship (alphabetical order). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2506.04990
summary: We introduce a multi-scale Image Super Resolution (ISR) method building on recent advances in Visual Auto-Regressive (VAR) modeling. VAR models break image tokenization into additive, gradually increasing scales, using Residual Quantization (RQ), an approach that aligns perfectly with our target ISR task. Previous works taking advantage of this synergy suffer from two main shortcomings. First, due to the limitations in RQ, they only generate images at a predefined fixed scale, failing to map intermediate outputs to the corresponding image scales. They also rely on large backbones or a large corpus of annotated data to achieve better performance. To address both shortcomings, we introduce two novel components to the VAR training for ISR, aiming at increasing its flexibility and reducing its complexity. In particular, we introduce a) a \textbf{Hierarchical Image Tokenization (HIT)} approach that progressively represents images at different scales while enforcing token overlap across scales, and b) a \textbf{Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) regularization term} that, relying solely on the (LR,HR) pair, encourages the transformer to produce the latter over the former. Our proposed HIT acts as a strong inductive bias for the VAR training, resulting in a small model (300M params vs 1B params of VARSR), that achieves state-of-the-art results without external training data, and that delivers multi-scale outputs with a single forward pass.

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合HIT（分层图像分词）和DPO（直接偏好优化）的VAR超分方法，实现单次前向传播的多尺度输出，300M参数模型无需外部数据即达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有VAR超分方法存在两个缺陷：1）受限于残差量化（RQ），只能生成固定尺度的图像，无法将中间输出映射到对应图像尺度；2）依赖大骨干网络或大量标注数据才能取得好性能。
AI.method: 1）分层图像分词（HIT）：渐进式表示不同尺度图像，并强制跨尺度的token重叠；2）直接偏好优化（DPO）正则项：仅依赖(LR,HR)图像对，促使transformer生成HR而非LR输出。
AI.result: 仅300M参数（对比VARSR的1B），无需外部训练数据，单次前向传播即实现多尺度输出，达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: HIT为VAR训练提供强归纳偏置，DPO作为有效的正则化手段，两者结合显著提升模型灵活性与效率。

title: Cognitive-Uncertainty Guided Knowledge Distillation for Accurate Classification of Student Misconceptions
summary: Accurately identifying student misconceptions is crucial for personalized education but faces three challenges: (1) data scarcity with long-tail distribution, where authentic student reasoning is difficult to synthesize; (2) fuzzy boundaries between error categories with high annotation noise; (3) deployment parado-large models overlook unconventional approaches due to pretraining bias and cannot be deployed on edge, while small models overfit to noise. Unlike traditional methods that increase diversity through large-scale data synthesis, we propose a two-stage knowledge distillation framework that mines high-value samples from existing data. The first stage performs standard distillation to transfer task capabilities. The second stage introduces a dual-layer marginal selection mechanism based on cognitive uncertainty, identifying four types of critical samples based on teacher model uncertainty and confidence differences. For different data subsets, we design difficulty-adaptive mechanism to balance hard/soft label contributions, enabling student models to inherit inter-class relationships from teacher soft labels while distinguishing ambiguous error types. Experiments show that with augmented training on only 10.30% of filtered samples, we achieve MAP@3 of 0.9585 (+17.8%) on the MAP-Charting dataset, and using only a 4B parameter model, we attain 84.38% accuracy on cross-topic tests of middle school algebra misconception benchmarks, significantly outperforming sota LLM (67.73%) and standard fine-tuned 72B models (81.25%). Our code is available at https://github.com/RoschildRui/acl2026_map.

AI.tldr: 提出两阶段知识蒸馏框架，通过认知不确定性驱动的双重边际选择机制挖掘高价值样本，仅用10.30%的筛选数据使4B模型在MAP@3达到0.9585（+17.8%），在中学代数错误概念基准上准确率84.38%，显著超过72B大模型。
AI.motivation: 学生错误概念识别面临数据稀疏（长尾分布）、错误类别边界模糊（标注噪声高）、部署悖论（大模型有预训练偏见且无法边缘部署，小模型过拟合噪声）三大挑战，现有大规模数据合成方法不适用。
AI.method: 两阶段知识蒸馏：第一阶段标准蒸馏迁移任务能力；第二阶段基于认知不确定性设计双层边际选择机制，根据教师模型不确定性和置信度差异识别四类关键样本，并针对不同数据子集设计难度自适应机制平衡硬/软标签贡献。
AI.result: 仅用筛选样本的10.30%进行增强训练，MAP@3达0.9585（+17.8%）；4B模型在中学代数错误概念跨主题测试中准确率84.38%，优于SOTA大模型（67.73%）和标准微调72B模型（81.25%）。
AI.conclusion: 验证了通过认知不确定性引导的样本筛选和难度自适应蒸馏，小模型能在数据稀缺和标签噪声环境下有效学习类别间关系并区分易混淆错误类型。

title: Your CLIP has 164 dimensions of noise: Exploring the embeddings covariance eigenspectrum of contrastively pretrained vision-language transformers
summary: Contrastively pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) serve as powerful feature extractors. Yet, their shared latent spaces are prone to structural anomalies and act as repositories for non-semantic, multi-modal noise. To address this phenomenon, we employ spectral decomposition of covariance matrices to decompose the VLM latent space into a multi-modal semantic signal component and a shared noise subspace. We observe that this noise geometry exhibits strong subgroup invariance across distinct data subsets. Crucially, pruning these shared noise dimensions is mainly harmless, preserving or actively improving downstream task performance. By isolating true semantic signals from artifactual noise, this work provides new mechanistic insights into the representational structure of modern VLMs, suggesting that a substantial fraction of their latent geometry is governed by shared, architecture-level noise rather than task-relevant semantics alone.

AI.tldr: 本文通过谱分解方法将VLM潜在空间分解为多模态语义信号和共享噪声子空间，发现噪声具有跨数据子集的不变性，去除这些噪声维度可保持或提升下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: VLM潜在空间存在结构异常和非语义的多模态噪声，影响表征质量，需要一种方法来分离语义信号与噪声。
AI.method: 对协方差矩阵进行谱分解，将VLM潜在空间分解为多模态语义信号分量和共享噪声子空间，并分析噪声的跨子群不变性。
AI.result: 噪声几何结构在不同数据子集上表现出强子群不变性；去除这些共享噪声维度对下游任务性能无害甚至有益。
AI.conclusion: VLM潜在空间中很大一部分几何结构由架构级的共享噪声主导，而非仅由任务相关的语义信号决定，为理解VLM表征结构提供了新的机制性洞察。

title: Crys-JEPA: Accelerating Crystal Discovery via Embedding Screening and Generative Refinement
summary: De novo crystal generation seeks to discover materials that are not merely realistic, but also stable and novel. However, most existing generative models are trained to maximize the likelihood of observed crystals, which encourages samples to stay close to known materials yet not necessarily align with the criteria that matter in discovery. Through an empirical investigation, we show that current crystal generative models are caught in a pronounced stability--novelty trade-off: moving toward the observed distribution preserves stability but limits novelty, whereas moving away from it quickly destroys stability. This suggests that the useful region for discovering crystals that are both stable and novel is extremely narrow. To escape the trade-off, we introduce Crys-JEPA, a joint embedding predictive architecture for crystals that learns an energy-aware latent space preserving formation-energy differences. In this space, stability assessment can be reformulated as an embedding-based comparison against accessible training crystals, reducing the reliance on expensive energy evaluation and task-specific external references. Building on Crys-JEPA, we further develop a screening-and-refinement pipeline that identifies promising generated crystals and reintroduces them to refine the generative model. On MP-20 and Alex-MP-20 datasets, we achieve improvements over baselines up to 81.4% and 82.6% on V.S.U.N metric, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Crys-JEPA架构，通过联合嵌入预测学习能量感知的潜空间，并结合筛选-精炼流程，有效解决晶体生成模型中稳定性与新颖性之间的权衡问题，在MP-20和Alex-MP-20数据集上V.S.U.N指标分别提升81.4%和82.6%。
AI.motivation: 现有晶体生成模型存在稳定性-新颖性的显著权衡：靠近观测分布保持稳定性但限制新颖性，远离则破坏稳定性，导致可用于发现既稳定又新颖晶体的区域极为狭窄。
AI.method: 提出Crys-JEPA（联合嵌入预测架构），学习能量感知的潜空间以保留形成能差异，将稳定性评估转化为基于嵌入的比较；并构建筛选-精炼流程，识别有前景的生成晶体并重新引入以优化生成模型。
AI.result: 在MP-20和Alex-MP-20数据集上，相比基线方法，V.S.U.N指标分别提升81.4%和82.6%。
AI.conclusion: Crys-JEPA有效规避了稳定性-新颖性权衡，无需昂贵的能量评估和任务特定的外部参考即可实现稳定且新颖的晶体生成。

title: SEDiT: Mask-Free Video Subtitle Erasure via One-step Diffusion Transformer
summary: Recent breakthroughs in video diffusion models have significantly accelerated the development of video editing techniques. However, existing methods often rely on inpainting video frames based on masked input, which requires extracting the target video mask in advance, and the precision of the segmentation directly affects the quality of the completion. In this paper, we present SEDiT, a novel one-stage video Subtitle Erasure approach via One-step Diffusion Transformer. We introduce a mask-free inference approach that enables direct erasure of the targeted subtitle. The proposed one-stage framework mitigates the sub-optimality inherent in the two-stage processing of prior models. Since subtitle removal is a localized editing task in which most pixels remain unchanged, the underlying distribution shift is minimal, making it well-suited to one-step generation under rectified flow. We empirically validate the reliability of one-step denoising and further provide a formal theoretical justification. Under the localized-editing structure of subtitle removal, the conditional optimal transport (OT) map and its induced rectified flow velocity field are Lipschitz continuous with respect to the latent variable, which underpins the theoretical feasibility of one-step sampling. To address the challenge of long-term temporal consistency, we adopt a hybrid training strategy by occasionally conditioning the model with a clean first-frame latent. This facilitates temporal continuity, allowing each segment during inference to leverage the output of its predecessor. To avoid visible seams caused by cropping and reinserting processed targets, particularly in scenarios involving substantial motion, we feed the original video directly into SEDiT. Thanks to one-step and chunk-wise streaming inference, our method can efficiently handle native 1440p video with infinite length.

AI.tldr: SEDiT提出了一种基于一步扩散变换器的掩码无监督视频字幕擦除方法，通过一步去噪和分块流式推理，实现了对本地化编辑任务的高效处理，支持无限长度和1440p分辨率视频。
AI.motivation: 现有视频编辑方法通常依赖掩码输入进行视频帧修补，需要预先提取目标视频掩码，且分割精度直接影响完成质量。此外，两阶段处理存在次优性问题。
AI.method: 提出掩码自由的推理方法，采用一步生成框架；通过理论证明条件最优传输映射和整流流速场关于潜变量的Lipschitz连续性，支撑一步采样的理论可行性；采用混合训练策略，偶尔以干净第一帧潜变量为条件，促进时间连续性；采用分块流式推理直接处理原始视频。
AI.result: 方法可高效处理原生1440p视频且支持无限长度，实证验证了一步去噪的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: SEDiT通过一步扩散变换器实现了高效的视频字幕擦除，解决了掩码依赖、两阶段次优性和长视频处理等问题，在视频编辑领域具有重要意义。

title: Compositional Sparsity as an Inductive Bias for Neural Architecture Design
summary: Identifying the structural priors that enable Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) to overcome the curse of dimensionality is a fundamental challenge in machine learning theory. Existing literature suggests that effective high-dimensional learning is driven by compositional sparsity, where target functions decompose into constituents supported on low-dimensional variable subsets. To investigate this hypothesis, we combine Information Filtering Networks (IFNs), which extract sparse dependency structures via constrained information maximisation, with Homological Neural Networks (HNNs), which map the inferred topology into fixed-wiring sparse neural graphs. We formalise the design principles underlying this construction and present an interpretable pipeline in which abstraction emerges through hierarchical composition. HNNs are orders of magnitude sparser than standard DNNs and require only minimal hyperparameter tuning. On synthetic tasks with known sparse hierarchies, HNNs recover the underlying compositional structure and remain stable in regimes where dense alternatives degrade as dimensionality increases. Across a broad suite of real-world datasets, HNNs consistently match or outperform dense baselines while using far fewer parameters, exhibiting lower variance and showing reduced sensitivity to hyperparameters.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出同调神经网络（HNNs），通过结合信息过滤网络（IFNs）提取稀疏依赖结构，并将推断出的拓扑映射为固定连线的稀疏神经图，从而在保持高性能的同时实现比标准DNN稀疏数个量级的网络结构，验证了组合稀疏性是高维学习成功的关键先验。
AI.motivation: 探究深度神经网络克服维度灾难所需的结构先验，验证组合稀疏性（compositional sparsity）假说——即目标函数可分解为支撑在低维变量子集上的组成部分。
AI.method: 将信息过滤网络（IFNs）与同调神经网络（HNNs）结合：IFNs通过约束信息最大化提取稀疏依赖结构，HNNs将推断出的拓扑映射为固定连线的稀疏神经图，通过层次组合实现抽象涌现。
AI.result: HNNs比标准DNN稀疏数个量级，仅需极少超参数调优。在已知稀疏层次的合成任务中能恢复底层组合结构，在高维退化场景下保持稳定。在真实数据集上，以远少于密集基线的参数匹配或超越其性能，方差更低且对超参数敏感性更弱。
AI.conclusion: 组合稀疏性是实现高维高效学习的关键先验，HNNs通过拓扑引导的稀疏连接设计有效验证了这一理论，为构建可解释、高鲁棒性的轻量神经网络提供了新范式。

title: MemLens: Benchmarking Multimodal Long-Term Memory in Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Memory is essential for large vision-language models (LVLMs) to handle long, multimodal interactions, with two method directions providing this capability: long-context LVLMs and memory-augmented agents. However, no existing benchmark conducts a systematic comparison of the two on questions that genuinely require multimodal evidence. To close this gap, we introduce MEMLENS, a comprehensive benchmark for memory in multimodal multi-session conversations, comprising 789 questions across five memory abilities (information extraction, multi-session reasoning, temporal reasoning, knowledge update, and answer refusal) at four standard context lengths (32K-256K tokens) under a cross-modal token-counting scheme. An image-ablation study confirms that solving MEMLENS requires visual evidence: removing evidence images drops two frontier LVLMs below 2% accuracy on the 80.4% of questions whose evidence includes images. Evaluating 27 LVLMs and 7 memory-augmented agents, we find that long-context LVLMs achieve high short-context accuracy through direct visual grounding but degrade as conversations grow, whereas memory agents are length-stable but lose visual fidelity under storage-time compression. Multi-session reasoning caps most systems below 30%, and neither approach alone solves the task. These results motivate hybrid architectures that combine long-context attention with structured multimodal retrieval. Our code is available at https://github.com/xrenaf/MEMLENS.

AI.tldr: MEMLENS是一个评估多模态多轮对话中记忆能力的基准，包含789个问题和五种记忆能力。研究发现长上下文LVLMs在短上下文中表现好但随长度退化，记忆代理长度稳定但损失视觉保真度，两者单独都无法解决任务，需要混合架构。
AI.motivation: 现有基准缺乏对长上下文LVLMs和记忆增强型agent在多模态多轮对话中记忆能力进行系统性比较，因此作者提出MEMLENS来填补这一空白。
AI.method: 构建了包含789个问题的MEMLENS基准，覆盖五种记忆能力（信息提取、多会话推理、时间推理、知识更新、拒绝回答），四种上下文长度（32K-256K tokens），采用跨模态token计数方案。对27个LVLMs和7个记忆增强型agent进行评测，并进行图像消融实验。
AI.result: 长上下文LVLMs在短上下文中准确率高但随对话增长而退化；记忆代理长度稳定但存储压缩时损失视觉保真度；多会话推理任务多数系统低于30%准确率；去除证据图像后前沿LVLMs准确率降至2%以下。
AI.conclusion: 两种方法各有优劣，单独无法解决多模态记忆任务，需要结合长上下文注意力与结构化多模态检索的混合架构。

title: Composable Crystals: Controllable Materials Discovery via Concept Learning
